Jika anda ada bukti, kemukakan di mahkamah. Jika tidak, berhenti menggunakan keistimewaan parlimen untuk membuat tuduhan yang anda tidak boleh buktikan.

Sumber: SCMP | Reuters | CNA

item.title: [BM] Menteri Sukan Kata 'Ambil Pengajaran Dan Teruskan' Dari Skandal Pemain Warisan — Mana Akauntabiliti Kerajaan?
item.description:
Said by: Dr. Mohammed Taufiq Johari, Youth and Sports Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 9 Mac 2026, Menteri Belia dan Sukan Dr. Mohammed Taufiq Johari menyeru Persatuan Bola Sepak Malaysia (FAM) untuk “mengambil pengajaran” daripada skandal pemain warisan dan bergerak ke hadapan dengan pembangunan bola sepak akar umbi. Mahkamah Timbang Tara Sukan (CAS) mengesahkan sanksi FIFA terhadap tujuh pemain yang didapati menggunakan dokumen palsu untuk mewakili Malaysia di peringkat antarabangsa. Kesemua tujuh menerima penggantungan 12 bulan. FIFA juga membatalkan keputusan tiga perlawanan antarabangsa dan mendenda FAM CHF350,000 (RM1.8 juta). Yang penting: tiada seorang pun daripada tujuh pemain itu mempunyai akar Malaysia. Label “pemain warisan” itu sendiri adalah rekaan.

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

Ini bukan sekadar skandal bola sepak. Ini skandal tadbir urus yang membabitkan kerajaan Malaysia di peringkat tertinggi. Tujuh pemain ini diberikan kewarganegaraan Malaysia melalui saluran rasmi kerajaan. Kementerian Dalam Negeri, di bawah Menteri Saifuddin Nasution Ismail, sebelum ini menyatakan semua permohonan kewarganegaraan “diproses mengikut undang-undang Malaysia.” Tetapi jika dokumen itu dipalsukan — seperti yang FIFA dapati dan CAS sahkan — maka sama ada proses tapisan kerajaan gagal secara besar-besaran, atau seseorang dalam sistem itu tahu dokumen itu palsu dan meluluskannya.

💩 Mengapa Ia Karut

“Ambil pengajaran dan teruskan” adalah kad keluar-penjara-percuma kerajaan Malaysia yang universal. Menteri Sukan tidak menamakan siapa dalam kerajaan yang meluluskan permohonan kewarganegaraan palsu. Beliau tidak menyeru siasatan terhadap proses tapisan KDN. Beliau tidak menjelaskan bagaimana dokumen palsu melepasi “prosedur operasi standard” JPN. Sebaliknya, beliau menyuruh FAM — badan sukan bebas — untuk “belajar.” FAM tidak memberikan lelaki-lelaki ini kewarganegaraan. Kerajaan yang melakukannya.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Corak ini — keterlibatan kerajaan diikuti pengalihan salah kepada pelaku bukan kerajaan — adalah kepakaran PH. Skandal SPRM/Azam Baki: Bloomberg mendedahkan ketidakteraturan pegangan saham, tindak balas Anwar adalah “jawatankuasa khas.” 1MDB di bawah PH: Anwar memotong separuh hukuman Najib. Lynas: kerajaan memperbaharui lesen 10 tahun walaupun isu sisa radioaktif tidak diselesaikan.

🎯 Teguran PH

Anda berkuasa dengan janji reformasi institusi dan akauntabiliti. Tujuh lelaki tanpa sebarang akar Malaysia diberikan kewarganegaraan Malaysia di bawah pengawasan anda. Mereka bermain untuk pasukan kebangsaan menggunakan dokumen palsu yang KDN anda sahkan sebagai sah. Siapa di KDN yang meluluskan permohonan ini? Apa yang berlaku semasa proses tapisan? Adakah akan ada siasatan dalaman? Sehingga anda menjawab soalan-soalan itu, “ambil pengajaran dan teruskan” hanyalah cara lain untuk berkata: kami tertangkap dan kami lebih suka anda lupa tentangnya.

Sumber: Scoop.my / Bernama | Malaysiakini | Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] MP PKR Sendiri Amaran Anwar Berisiko Hilang Legitimasi Kerana Abaikan Nurul Izzah Dan Ahli Parlimen Belakang Soal SPRM
item.description:
Said by: Hassan Abdul Karim, PKR MP for Pasir Gudang

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 9 Mac 2026, MP PKR Pasir Gudang Hassan Abdul Karim secara terbuka memberi amaran kepada PM Anwar Ibrahim — presiden partinya sendiri — bahawa mengabaikan kebimbangan yang dibangkitkan MP dan timbalan presiden PKR Nurul Izzah Anwar tentang SPRM meletakkan legitimasi PM dalam risiko. Bercakap kepada Malaysiakini, Hassan berkata Anwar tidak boleh terus menutup telinga terhadap kebimbangan dalaman parti mengenai kelakuan SPRM, terutama selepas Nurul Izzah menyeru agensi itu diletakkan di bawah pengawasan parlimen.

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

Ini bukan serangan pembangkang — ini ahli parlimen belakang PKR yang merekodkan secara terbuka bahawa presiden parti sedang merosakkan kredibilitinya sendiri. Apabila MP gabungan anda sendiri secara terbuka mempersoalkan legitimasi anda atas agensi antirasuah yang anda pernah janjikan untuk diperbaharui, kerosakan institusi bukan lagi masalah persepsi — ia adalah krisis dalaman parti.

💩 Mengapa Ia Karut

Anwar menghabiskan berdekad sebagai wajah reformasi. Beliau berjanji tadbir urus bersih, kebebasan institusi, dan akauntabiliti. Tiga hari sebelum amaran Hassan, Anwar sendiri menolak kritikan Bersih terhadap SPRM sebagai “tidak adil” dan menyuruh rakyat Malaysia menunggu laporan — taktik tangguh yang sama yang setiap PM Malaysia gunakan untuk membunuh momentum akauntabiliti. Kini ahli partinya sendiri memberitahu akhbar bahawa keengganannya mendengar adalah masalah legitimasi.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini bukan kali pertama keretakan dalaman PH menjadi awam. Pada Disember 2025, DAP mengancam “mempertimbangkan semula” kedudukannya dalam kerajaan jika Anwar gagal menyampaikan reformasi dalam enam bulan. Nurul Izzah sendiri telah menyeru jawatankuasa pengawasan SPRM bebas seawal Februari 2026. Coraknya jelas: tangguh sebagai strategi, kesetiaan sebagai kesunyian.

🎯 Teguran PH

Anda berjanji reformasi. Anda berjanji tiada siapa yang kebal daripada penelitian. Kini anak perempuan anda sendiri menyeru pengawasan SPRM, ahli parlimen belakang anda memberi amaran kepada anda dalam akhbar, dan tindak balas anda adalah menyuruh semua orang bertenang dan menunggu jawatankuasa. Inilah realitinya, Perdana Menteri: apabila ahli parti anda terpaksa menggunakan Malaysiakini untuk mendapatkan perhatian anda mengenai rasuah, anda sudah kehilangan kuasa moral yang anda pernah tuntut.

Sumber: Malaysiakini | FMT — Nurul Izzah soal SPRM | The Star

item.title: [BM] Pengkhianatan Muktamad: Anwar Bina Harapan, Jual Kepada UMNO, Dan Panggil Ia Reformasi
item.description:
Said by: Compilation: CSIS, Toda, CNA, East Asia Forum, ISEAS, Amnesty, HRW, Freedom House

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Selepas tiga tahun berkuasa, keputusan daripada badan pemerhati antarabangsa, badan pemikir, dan penganalisis adalah sebulat suara: Anwar Ibrahim gagal menyampaikan agenda reformasinya.

  • CSIS: ‘Kematian Reformasi.’
  • Institut Keamanan Toda: ‘Memburukkan keadaan.’
  • Amnesty International: ‘Mengkhianati ikrar reformasi.’
  • HRW: ‘Agenda reformasi terhenti.’
  • Freedom House: ‘Separa Bebas’ (tidak berubah).
  • CNA: ‘Ribut sempurna’ krisis.
  • East Asia Forum: ‘Aspirasi reformasi bertembung dengan realiti politik.’
  • ISEAS: ‘Memerlukan ketegasan, keadilan dan kesedaran diri.’ 🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING: Ini bukan seorang pengkritik, satu perspektif, atau satu serangan partisan. Ini adalah KONSENSUS merentas institusi paling dihormati di dunia bahawa projek reformasi Anwar telah gagal. Apabila CSIS di Washington, Amnesty di London, ISEAS di Singapura, Toda di Tokyo, dan Freedom House semuanya mencapai kesimpulan yang sama secara bebas, ia bukan berat sebelah — ia kebenaran.

💩 KENAPA IA KARUT: Anwar mempunyai SEGALANYA: naratif peribadi penderitaan, gerakan dibina atas harapan, mandat pengundi, bilangan parlimen, muhibah antarabangsa, dan pengalaman berdekad. Beliau mempunyai lebih banyak modal politik daripada mana-mana PM yang masuk dalam sejarah Malaysia. Dan beliau membelanjakan SEMUANYA untuk mengekalkan kuasa melalui rangkaian naungan UMNO dan bukannya menyampaikan reformasi yang mewajarkan keseluruhan kewujudan politiknya. Ini bukan kegagalan keadaan — ini kegagalan watak.

📜 KES TERDAHULU: Malaysia pernah mempunyai gerakan reformasi sebelum ini. Reformasi 1998. Tsunami politik 2008. Kemenangan PH 2018. Setiap kali, harapan melonjak dan dikhianati. Tetapi pengkhianatan Anwar adalah yang paling lengkap kerana beliau adalah penjelmaan harapan itu sendiri.

🎯 PANGGILAN PH: Anda minta kepercayaan kami. Kami berikan. Anda minta undi kami. Kami sampaikan. Anda minta kesabaran. Kami tunjukkan. Dan sebagai balasan, anda berikan kami UMNO sebagai rakan kongsi anda, rasuah di pejabat anda, penindasan pengkritik anda, dan kos sara hidup yang semakin teruk setiap bulan. 200+ entri dalam pangkalan data ini bukan propaganda pembangkang — ia REKOD ANDA, didokumenkan dengan data kerajaan ANDA sendiri dan dinilai oleh institusi paling dihormati di dunia. Inilah rupa sebenar ‘Malaysia Madani’. Ini warisan anda. Milikinya.

Sumber: CSIS — Kematian Reformasi | Institut Keamanan Toda — Laporan 184 | CNA | East Asia Forum | HRW | Freedom House | Amnesty International melalui Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] Zafrul Memberi Keterangan Dalam Perbicaraan Rasuah Muhyiddin — Orang Yang Khidmat Dua Belah Pihak Naik Kandang Saksi
item.description:
Said by: Tengku Zafrul Abdul Aziz / Muhyiddin Yassin Defence Team

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Tengku Zafrul dijadualkan memberi keterangan dalam perbicaraan rasuah bekas PM Muhyiddin Yassin, yang menghadapi tuduhan meminta rasuah RM232.5 juta untuk Bersatu melalui program Jana Wibawa. Zafrul berkhidmat sebagai Menteri Kewangan Muhyiddin semasa tempoh kesalahan didakwa berlaku (Mac 2020 hingga Ogos 2021). Pasukan pembelaan turut memberi isyarat rancangan memanggil tokoh perniagaan Syed Mokhtar untuk memberi keterangan. Tarikh perbicaraan ditetapkan sehingga Ogos 2026.

🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING: Zafrul adalah Menteri Kewangan apabila kontrak Jana Wibawa didakwa digunakan sebagai kenderaan rasuah. Kini beliau secara serentak menjadi Penasihat Politik Kanan Anwar dan saksi dalam perbicaraan PM yang kerajaannya pernah beliau khidmati. Potensi konflik kepentingan amat mengejutkan: saksi berkhidmat untuk kerajaan semasa, yang mempunyai kepentingan politik dalam sabitan bekas PM. Keterangannya boleh dibentuk — atau dilihat dibentuk — oleh kesetiaan semasanya.

💩 KENAPA IA KARUT: Di mana-mana demokrasi lain, penasihat kanan kerajaan yang menjadi saksi utama dalam perbicaraan rasuah bekas bosnya akan mencetuskan protokol penarikbalikan diri, pertimbangan peguam bebas, atau sekurang-kurangnya cuti sementara daripada tugas kerajaan. Di Malaysia, tiada siapa yang kisah. Zafrul akan memberi keterangan tentang keputusan kewangan yang beliau selia sebagai Menteri Kewangan, kemudian berjalan kembali ke pejabatnya sebagai penasihat Anwar. Sempadan institusi yang sepatutnya menghalang perkara ini tidak wujud.

📜 KES TERDAHULU: Pertindihan politik-kehakiman Malaysia mempunyai sejarah panjang dan buruk. Krisis kehakiman 1988, perbicaraan Anwar sendiri, dan DNAA Zahid semuanya menunjukkan apa yang berlaku apabila kepentingan politik mencemari prosiding undang-undang. Peranan dwi Zafrul sebagai penasihat semasa dan saksi perbicaraan adalah bab terkini.

🎯 PANGGILAN PH: Penasihat kanan anda berkhidmat sebagai menteri kewangan kepada lelaki yang anda dakwa. Beliau menyelia belanjawan semasa tempoh rasuah didakwa berlaku. Kini beliau penasihat ekonomi terdekat anda. Rakyat Malaysia sepatutnya percaya keterangannya tidak dipengaruhi oleh majikannya sekarang? Sama ada letakkan Zafrul bercuti semasa perbicaraan atau terangkan bagaimana ini bukan konflik kepentingan yang jelas.

Sumber: Malay Mail

item.title: Anwar Announces 125,000 Civil Servant Promotions From Grade 1 to Grade 5 — A Two-Week Course and a Pay Bump Before the Election
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim announced on March 9, 2026 that 125,000 lower-ranked civil servants currently at Grade 1 will be promoted to Grade 5 starting January 2027. The only requirement: completing a two-to-three-week training course covering IT skills and other competencies. Anwar directed the Public Service Department (PSD) to work out the details. This announcement came during the same week as the RM500 civil servant bonuses, the RM15 billion STR cash handouts brought forward before Hari Raya, and the RM500 payments to 70,000 mosque and religious personnel.

🔥 Why It Matters

Malaysia has 1.7 million civil servants — the largest voting bloc in the country. Anwar has now stacked RM500 bonuses, record STR handouts, and a mass promotion programme into a single pre-Hari Raya, pre-election window. The Grade 1-to-Grade 5 jump is not a meritocratic reform — it is a blanket upgrade with a tokenistic training requirement. A two-week course does not transform capability; it transforms payroll. With snap elections rumoured for July 2026, this is the clearest signal yet that Anwar is buying the civil service vote with public money.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

This is not a promotion — it is a reclassification dressed up as career development. If 125,000 people can jump four grades after a two-week course, then either Grade 1 was always undervalued or Grade 5 standards have been gutted. Either way, the government is expanding the wage bill without any corresponding productivity reform. Anwar once promised a lean, efficient public service. Instead he has delivered the most expensive civil service expansion in Malaysian history — bonuses, handouts, promotions, and mosque staff payments — all timed to land before the next general election.

📜 Previous Cases

Every Malaysian government has used civil service sweeteners before elections. Najib announced special payments and grade revisions before GE14. Muhyiddin did the same during Sheraton Move instability. Anwar criticised all of it from the opposition bench. Now in power, he has outdone every predecessor — combining cash bonuses, mass promotions, and targeted religious payments into a single pre-election package that makes Najib’s BR1M look modest by comparison.

🎯 PH Callout

You said you would reform the civil service. You said efficiency, meritocracy, and right-sizing. Instead you handed out RM500 bonuses, fast-tracked 125,000 promotions through a two-week course, and padded the payroll of the country’s largest voting bloc — all in the same month you told the rakyat to ‘be thrifty.’ If this is reform, it is reform of the election calendar, not the public service. The rakyat can see what this is. The only question is whether you think they care.

Sources: Bernama | Malay Mail | The Sun

item.title: Anwar Condemns Iran's Attacks on Kuwait — Weeks After Parliament Motion Defending Iran Against US-Israel Strikes
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

On March 9, 2026, Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim called the Prime Minister of Kuwait, Sheikh Ahmad Abdullah Al-Ahmad Al-Sabah, to condemn Iranian attacks targeting Kuwait. He expressed condolences for the casualties and affirmed Malaysia’s support for Kuwait’s security and territorial integrity. This phone call came exactly one week after Anwar tabled an emergency motion in Parliament on March 2 condemning US-Israel strikes on Iran, during which he declared that Malaysia could ’no longer swallow’ Western human rights lectures and PH backbencher Syahredzan Johan called on MPs to boycott all US embassy events.

🔥 Why It Matters

The whiplash is the point. Seven days ago, Anwar positioned Malaysia as a defender of Iran against Western aggression, framing the conflict in anti-imperialist terms and using it to score domestic political points with his base. Now Iran is the aggressor striking a Gulf neighbour, and Anwar has to condemn the same country he was defending. This isn’t principled foreign policy — it’s reactive, opportunistic positioning that changes with the news cycle. Malaysia’s stance on the Middle East conflict now reads less like a coherent doctrine and more like whichever statement plays best on the day it is made.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

You cannot table an emergency motion defending Iran on Monday and condemn Iran the following Monday and pretend both positions are part of a coherent foreign policy framework. Either Malaysia has a principled stance on sovereignty and the use of force — in which case it should have been more measured on March 2 instead of turning Parliament into a political rally — or it’s making it up as it goes. The Syahredzan boycott call looks especially absurd now: should MPs also boycott Iranian embassy events? The March 2 motion was not about principle. It was about performance. And this week’s condemnation proves it.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysia’s foreign policy under Anwar has been marked by reactive, headline-driven positioning. The government has oscillated between courting Western investment and denouncing Western hypocrisy, between engaging China on trade and pushing back on South China Sea issues, depending on the domestic audience. Mahathir did the same thing — his famous ‘Jews rule the world’ speech at OIC in 2003 was followed by continued quiet engagement with Western financial institutions. The pattern is Malaysian — grand rhetorical gestures for the gallery, pragmatic retreats behind closed doors.

🎯 PH Callout

PH, if you want Malaysia to be taken seriously on the world stage, pick a lane. You turned Parliament into a solidarity rally for Iran seven days ago. Your own backbencher called for a boycott of US embassy events. Now you’re calling Kuwait to condemn the same country you were defending. What is Malaysia’s actual position? Is it anti-aggression regardless of who the aggressor is? Then say that consistently. Is it pro-Muslim solidarity? Then explain why you’re condemning a Muslim-majority country attacking another Muslim-majority country. The rakyat deserves a foreign policy, not a mood board.

Sources: QNA | Straits Times

item.title: Anwar Orders Mass Promotion of 125,000 Civil Servants — During Austerity, Ahead of Elections, After a 2-Week Course
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister and Finance Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

On March 9, Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim announced at the Ministry of Domestic Trade and Cost of Living (KPDN) assembly in Putrajaya that 125,000 Grade 1 civil servants — administrative, clerical, and financial assistants — will be promoted to Grade 5 effective January 2027. The only requirement: complete a two-to-three-week training course covering basic IT skills. Anwar directed Chief Secretary Shamsul Azri Abu Bakar and the Public Service Department (PSD) to ensure all 125,000 promotions are processed within six months.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is a mass promotion affecting one of the largest blocks of government employees — and it was announced during the same week the government imposed austerity measures, banned Raya open houses, tripled the RON95 subsidy bill to RM2 billion, and told Malaysians not to panic-buy. The timing is not subtle. With GE16 on the horizon and PH’s approval under pressure from the oil crisis, the Azam Baki scandal, and rising cost of living, 125,000 grateful civil servants — plus their families — represent a significant electoral constituency. This is fiscal patronage dressed as human capital development.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

A two-week IT course to jump four grades is not a promotion — it’s a loyalty programme. Real public service reform means restructuring roles, improving service delivery, and tying advancement to performance and merit. Anwar’s government has spent three years talking about reforming the bloated civil service. Instead of restructuring, they’re inflating grades, expanding the wage bill, and calling it “empowerment.” The announcement came at a ministry assembly — not Parliament, not a formal policy rollout — because this is a gift, not a reform.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysia’s civil service has long been a political tool. Najib’s government introduced massive pay rises under Sistem Saraan Malaysia revisions ahead of GE14. Muhyiddin’s Perikatan Nasional offered special payments and bonuses to shore up support. Anwar himself approved a RM500 Hari Raya bonus for civil servants just days before announcing the Raya open house ban for “fiscal discipline.” The pattern is clear: every government uses the 1.7-million-strong civil service as a vote bank, and the SSPA restructuring — which Anwar promised would be merit-based — is now a conveyor belt for mass upgrades.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised a leaner, more efficient public sector. You promised meritocracy. You promised that SSPA would be different from every previous pay scheme. Instead, you’ve turned a four-grade promotion into a two-week course and timed it to land before the next election. If 125,000 promotions can be processed in six months, why has it taken three years to reform fuel subsidies, implement targeted aid properly, or hold your own anti-corruption chief accountable? The civil service deserves real career pathways — not pre-election sweeteners wrapped in a training brochure.

Sources: Malay Mail | NST | The Star | Bernama

item.title: Anwar Repeats 'Aid Based on Need, Not Race' in Dewan Negara — Same Script, Different Session, Zero Structural Change
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED

Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim told the Dewan Negara on March 9, 2026, that government aid and assistance are allocated based on need, not race. He affirmed that the Madani government would “remain fair to all states” and that assistance targets those most in need regardless of background.

This is not the first time Anwar has used this exact line. In August 2025, he told the same Dewan Negara the same thing — almost word for word — as reported by The Star and NST. Before that, the 13th Malaysia Plan (13MP) was framed around the same “needs-based, not race-based” rhetoric.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS

This is one of PH’s most repeated slogans. It was central to the Madani Economy pitch, and it resonates with voters who are tired of race-based distribution systems that benefit political insiders rather than the genuinely poor.

But slogans are not policy. The question is simple: has the government actually restructured any major Bumiputera-specific allocation program since taking power? Has any race-based quota been reformed? Has any procurement preference been revised to be purely needs-based?

The answer, by all available evidence, is no. The 13MP talked about shifting to needs-based frameworks, but core Bumiputera economic programs, GLICs, and procurement carve-outs remain structurally unchanged. The Poverty Line Income (PGK) thresholds have been updated — a technocratic adjustment — but the architecture of race-based distribution is untouched.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT

Saying “aid is based on need, not race” while leaving every race-based allocation structure intact is not reform. It is branding.

Anwar is not lying — technically, some aid programs like SARA and certain welfare payments do target low-income households regardless of race. But the big-ticket items — Bumiputera equity targets, MARA allocations, Bumiputera-only procurement set-asides, GLC preferential hiring — remain untouched. Nobody in the Madani government has proposed reforming any of these.

What Anwar is doing is classic misdirection: point to the small welfare programs that are needs-based, repeat the slogan, and hope nobody asks about the structural architecture that makes Malaysia’s economy one of the most racially stratified in the region.

Repeat it enough times in enough Dewan Negara sessions and maybe people will believe it. That is the strategy.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES

  • August 2025: Anwar told Dewan Negara that “allocations are based on needs, not race.” Same chamber, same script. (The Star, 25 Aug 2025)
  • July 2025: The 13MP was launched with the framing of shifting from race-based to needs-based policies. (Malay Mail, 31 Jul 2025)
  • Deputy Economy Minister Hanifah Hajar Taib (Dec 2025): Told Parliament the government was “reviewing” the use of disposable income as a fairer benchmark for aid eligibility — meaning even the basic measurement tools hadn’t been reformed yet, over two years into the administration. (The Star, 4 Dec 2025)
  • The core contradiction has existed since Anwar took office: the Madani government promises needs-based reform while relying on UMNO — the party whose entire political model depends on race-based distribution — as its coalition anchor.

🎯 PH CALLOUT

You ran on “Reformasi.” You promised a Malaysia where race would not determine access to opportunity. You told the rakyat that Madani meant fairness.

Three years later, every single race-based structural program remains intact. Not one has been reformed. Not one has been publicly reviewed. Not one has been opened to needs-based criteria.

And yet you stand in Dewan Negara — for the second time in less than a year — and say the same line: “based on need, not race.”

If that were true, show us the policy paper. Show us the program that was restructured. Show us the quota that was reformed.

Until then, this is not a policy. It is a press release.

Sources: Bernama via Facebook | The Star (Aug 2025) | NST (Aug 2025) | Malay Mail (13MP, Jul 2025) | The Star (Dec 2025)

item.title: Anwar Won't Suspend Azam Baki — Will Just Let His Contract Expire in May While the Country Burns
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Straits Times sources

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: The Straits Times reported on March 9, 2026 — citing high-level government and legal sources — that Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has decided not to renew MACC chief commissioner Tan Sri Azam Baki’s tenure when it expires on May 12, 2026. This would mark the end of Azam’s fourth annual extension since reaching retirement age in 2023. According to the report, Anwar has “repeatedly stressed to Cabinet in recent weeks that Azam won’t be renewed.” But crucially, Anwar is not suspending Azam now. He is not ordering an independent public inquiry. He is not referring the matter to Parliament. He is simply going to let the clock run out — two more months of an anti-corruption chief accused of being the head of a “corporate mafia.” This comes after Bloomberg reported that the MACC under Azam had abused its powers to extort and manipulate corporate figures; Azam was found to have breached civil servant shareholding rules multiple times, most recently in January 2026, holding 17.7 million shares in Velocity Capital Bhd; former Economy Minister Rafizi Ramli and 8 PKR MPs publicly demanded Azam’s immediate suspension; Bersih demanded resignation and organised protests; DAP Secretary-General Anthony Loke called the government’s response “inadequate”; and a Feb 15 rally in Kuala Lumpur demanded Azam’s arrest.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: This is not a win. This is damage control dressed up as a decision. Anwar is letting Azam Baki serve out his remaining two months while the MACC remains under a cloud of allegations that it operates as an extortion racket. Every investigation the MACC conducts between now and May 12 is tainted. Every raid, every summons, every prosecution carries the stench of an agency whose credibility has collapsed. The Straits Times quoted advisory firm Viewfinder Global Affairs: “That is a win that DAP will have to take and try to convince their supporters that they are making progress. It won’t be easy as the damage has been done from over three years of stalled reforms.” Risk consultancy KRA Group’s Amir Fareed Rahim was blunter: “Getting to the bottom of issues surrounding the MACC is a baseline requirement before talking about other reforms.” DAP has brought forward its national congress from September to July to decide whether to stay in the Anwar administration — based on whether reform progress accelerates in the first half of 2026. Letting Azam ride out his contract is not acceleration. It is coasting.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: Let’s count the ways this is a failure. 1. Anwar renewed Azam three times. Every year since 2023, Anwar personally extended the tenure of a man his own coalition had demanded be suspended back in 2021-2022. He had the power to end this years ago. He chose not to. 2. PH campaigned on parliamentary vetting of the MACC chief. In GE15, Pakatan Harapan promised that the appointment of the MACC chief would be subject to parliamentary scrutiny. It is now 2026. That never happened. Azam was renewed by executive fiat, three times, with zero parliamentary oversight. 3. “Not renewing” is not accountability. Suspension triggers an investigation. Non-renewal just means Azam walks away in May with his pension, his dignity intact, and zero legal consequences for the alleged abuses under his watch. The difference matters. 4. Anwar called the MACC allegations a Zionist conspiracy. Instead of confronting the institutional rot, Anwar told Parliament on March 3 that the criticism of the MACC was part of a “Zionist plot to topple the government.” Police are now investigating critics under Section 124B — a law that carries a 20-year jail term. This is not reform. This is Najib-era playbook. 5. Two more months of a compromised agency. The MACC is currently investigating the Daim family for an alleged “plot to topple the government.” The MACC is investigating critics of Azam Baki under sedition-adjacent laws. And the head of this agency is a man accused of running a corporate shakedown operation. Letting him serve two more months is not prudent. It is reckless.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: 2021 — First shareholding scandal: Azam Baki was found to own over a million shares in a listed company, breaching civil service rules. NGOs and PH parties — including PKR and DAP — demanded action from then-PM Ismail Sabri. Nothing happened. 2022 — PH election promise: PH’s GE15 manifesto included a commitment to have Parliament vet the MACC chief’s appointment. After winning, Anwar quietly shelved the idea and renewed Azam by executive decision — three years running. 2023-2025 — Three renewals: Anwar extended Azam’s tenure annually despite the unresolved 2021 scandal, growing civil society pressure, and reports of MACC overreach. February 2026 — Bloomberg exposé: Bloomberg reported systematic abuses by the MACC, including alleged collusion between MACC top brass and business figures. This triggered street protests, the “Arrest Azam Baki” rally, and demands from within PH for immediate suspension. November 2025 — Sabah wipeout: PH won just 1 of 22 seats in the Sabah state election. DAP lost every seat it contested. Among the issues: perceived selective prosecution linked to MACC investigations.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: You promised parliamentary oversight of the MACC chief. You never delivered. You renewed Azam Baki three times. You ignored the 2021 scandal. You ignored the Bloomberg revelations for weeks. When your own MPs demanded action, you called the criticism a Zionist conspiracy. And now your big move is to not renew his contract — the bare minimum — while letting him serve two more months at the helm of an agency accused of operating like a protection racket. This is not reform. This is running out the clock and calling it progress. Anwar Ibrahim once said: “We will not tolerate corruption in any form.” He has now tolerated it in the most visible form imaginable — at the very top of the agency meant to fight it — for over three years. If you want Malaysians to believe you are different from your predecessors, act like it. Suspend Azam Baki now. Establish a royal commission of inquiry. Refer the MACC chief appointment to Parliament, as you promised. Stop hiding behind task forces and conspiracy theories. The rakyat are watching. And they are not impressed.

Sources: The Straits Times | The Edge Malaysia — Rafizi calls for suspension | SCMP — Malaysia considers royal commission | Malaysiakini via Facebook — 8 PKR MPs demand suspension | Reuters — Anwar tells parliament of plot | CNA — Anwar’s perfect storm

item.title: Daim's Family Sues Anwar's Government Over 'Zionist Plot' Claims — Calls Police Probe Unlawful and Unconstitutional
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Daim Zainuddin’s Family (Respondents)

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

The family of late former finance minister Daim Zainuddin — his widow Naimah Abdul Khalid, two sons, and two family lawyers — filed a lawsuit at the Kuala Lumpur High Court on March 7, 2026, seeking a declaration that the police investigation into the alleged plot to topple Anwar’s government is unlawful, unconstitutional, and tainted by bad faith. This comes after Anwar told Parliament on March 3 that a suspect in the alleged conspiracy had engaged an international PR firm to launch coordinated attacks on national institutions, claiming the plot involved ‘a prominent Zionist group,’ foreign lobbyists, bankers, and international media agencies.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is no longer just a political narrative — it is now a legal confrontation. Anwar built his case for the ‘Zionist plot’ on parliamentary privilege and police reports, but a court challenge forces his government to produce actual evidence or face the embarrassment of having its probe declared unconstitutional. Critics are already pointing out the hypocrisy: Anwar’s own political camp sought foreign support, engaged international media, and lobbied overseas governments extensively during his decades in opposition. The lawsuit turns Anwar’s own reformist framing against him — if this government truly believes in due process and rule of law, it cannot simultaneously brand overseas lobbying as subversion when it’s done by opponents.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar spent years as an opposition leader cultivating ties with international media, foreign governments, and global civil society to pressure Malaysian governments. His allies flew to Washington, London, and Geneva to make their case. That was advocacy. But when Daim’s family allegedly does something similar, it’s a ‘Zionist conspiracy to topple the government.’ The double standard is not subtle — it is the entire structure. This is a prime minister who promised accountability and institutional reform, now using the language of conspiracy theories and securitisation to deflect from legitimate questions about MACC misconduct and elite impunity. The ‘Zionist plot’ framing is a political shield, not a legal argument.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysian governments have a long tradition of invoking external threats to shut down domestic dissent. Mahathir blamed ‘Jewish speculators’ for the 1997 financial crisis. Najib’s government accused foreign interference when the 1MDB scandal broke. Anwar himself was the target of politically motivated prosecutions dressed up in legal language. The playbook is familiar: when the pressure mounts, find a foreign enemy. Anwar once stood on the other side of this tactic. Now he is running it.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised Malaysia Madani — a civilised, reformist, accountable government. You promised that your administration would not criminalise dissent or use state machinery against political opponents. So what is this? A family exercises its legal right to challenge a police investigation and your response is to let the ‘Zionist plot’ narrative hang in the air like a threat. If you have evidence, present it in court. If you don’t, stop using parliamentary privilege to make accusations you can’t prove. The rakyat did not vote for another government that hides behind conspiracy theories when the questions get uncomfortable.

Sources: SCMP | Reuters | CNA

item.title: DAP Brings Forward Congress to July — Will Vote on Whether Leaders Should Quit Government, But Promises to Stay Anyway
item.description:
Said by: Anthony Loke, DAP Secretary-General / Transport Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

DAP, the largest component party in Anwar’s Pakatan Harapan coalition by parliamentary seats, has brought forward its national congress from September to July 12, 2026. At the congress, more than 4,000 delegates will vote in an internal referendum on whether party leaders should resign from their government posts. DAP secretary-general and Transport Minister Anthony Loke told Malaysiakini on February 24 that “the government’s response has been inadequate and does not meet public expectations” regarding the MACC scandal. The move comes after DAP lost every seat it contested in November’s Sabah state polls and faces mounting grassroots anger over stalled reforms, the MACC crisis, and the perception that DAP is enabling a government that has abandoned its own platform.

🔥 Why It Matters

DAP’s congress is now the most important internal event on PH’s political calendar before the next general election. If an overwhelming majority of delegates vote for leaders to resign, it would destabilise Anwar’s government at the worst possible time — just as snap election preparations are underway. DAP supplies the single largest bloc of PH MPs, and losing its ministers would leave a vacuum in Cabinet. The referendum is also a proxy vote on whether DAP’s base still believes the unity government is worth supporting. For a party that built its brand on anti-corruption and institutional reform, the MACC scandal — and the government’s failure to act decisively — is existential.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Here’s the tell: DAP says its MPs will continue backing Anwar regardless of the referendum outcome. So the delegates get to feel empowered by voting for a dramatic gesture, while the party leadership has already pre-committed to changing nothing. It’s accountability theatre. Loke says the government’s response is inadequate, then stays in the government. DAP says reforms are a red line, then watches the PM tenure bill fail and the MACC chief remain in office. Bringing forward a congress to threaten to leave while promising to stay is not pressure politics. It’s a performance designed to placate the base while preserving power.

📜 Previous Cases

DAP has a pattern of loudly objecting and quietly complying. In 2023, the party protested UMNO’s influence in the unity government but stayed. In 2024, DAP MPs raised concerns about Najib’s house arrest deal but took no action. When Azam Baki’s shareholding scandal first surfaced in 2021-2022, DAP — then in opposition — demanded his suspension. Now in government, DAP waited years before its own secretary-general called the response “inadequate.” The Sabah wipeout in November 2025 should have been a wake-up call. Instead, DAP’s response is a congress five months away where the outcome has been pre-neutralised.

🎯 PH Callout

DAP, you told your voters you would be the conscience of the unity government. You said joining Anwar meant reform from the inside. Three years in, your own secretary-general admits the government’s response to corruption is inadequate. Your grassroots are furious. Your Sabah results were a humiliation. And your answer is a congress where delegates vote on a question you’ve already decided doesn’t matter? Either the referendum means something or it doesn’t. If your leaders stay regardless of the outcome, stop pretending this is democracy within the party. It’s damage control.

Sources: Straits Times | CNA | The Star

item.title: PKR's Own MP Warns Anwar Risks Legitimacy by Ignoring Nurul Izzah and Backbenchers on MACC
item.description:
Said by: Hassan Abdul Karim, PKR MP for Pasir Gudang

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 What Happened

On 9 March 2026, PKR’s Pasir Gudang MP Hassan Abdul Karim publicly warned Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim — his own party president — that ignoring concerns raised by MPs and PKR deputy president Nurul Izzah Anwar about the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) puts the PM’s legitimacy at risk. Speaking to Malaysiakini, Hassan said Anwar cannot keep turning a deaf ear to internal party concerns about the MACC’s conduct, particularly after Nurul Izzah called for the agency to be placed under parliamentary oversight and criticised the “high-handed manner” of investigations including the RM1.1 billion Arm Holdings deal probe.

🔥 Why It Matters

This is not an opposition attack — it is a PKR backbencher going on record to say the party president is damaging his own credibility. When your own coalition MPs are publicly questioning your legitimacy over an anti-corruption agency that you once promised to reform, the institutional rot is no longer a perception problem — it is an internal party crisis. Nurul Izzah’s March 7 call for MACC reform via Bernama, FMT, and NST was already a rare public break from the PM’s daughter and deputy president. Hassan’s statement escalates it further: from polite disagreement to a warning about the PM’s fitness to lead.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar spent decades as the face of reformasi. He promised clean governance, institutional independence, and accountability. Three days before Hassan’s warning, Anwar himself dismissed Bersih’s criticism of the MACC as “unfair” and told Malaysians to wait for reports — the same delay tactic every Malaysian PM has used to kill accountability momentum. Now his own party members are telling the press that his refusal to listen is a legitimacy problem. The man who once led street protests against abuse of power is now the man whose backbenchers have to beg him, through the media, to pay attention to abuse of power.

📜 Previous Cases

This is not the first time PH’s internal cracks have gone public. In December 2025, DAP threatened to “reconsider” its position in government if Anwar failed to deliver reforms within six months — a move prompted by DAP’s wipeout in the Sabah state election. Nurul Izzah herself had called for an independent MACC oversight committee as early as February 2026. The MACC crisis — centred on chief commissioner Azam Baki’s unresolved shareholding scandal — has been a slow-burning credibility fire since 2022. Every time a coalition MP speaks up, Anwar’s response is the same: wait, trust the AG, don’t be emotional. The pattern is unmistakable: delay as strategy, loyalty as silence.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised reformasi. You promised that no one is above scrutiny. You promised institutional independence. Now your own daughter is calling for MACC oversight, your own backbenchers are warning you in the press, and your response is to tell everyone to calm down and wait for a committee. Here is the reality, Prime Minister: when your party members have to use Malaysiakini to get your attention on corruption, you have already lost the moral authority you once claimed. Either act on MACC reform or admit that “reform” was always just a campaign slogan with an expiry date.

Sources: Malaysiakini | FMT — Nurul Izzah on MACC | The Star — Nurul Izzah wants MACC under Parliament | Bernama — Nurul Izzah on checks and balances | FMT — Anwar pans Bersih

item.title: Sports Minister Says 'Learn Lessons and Move On' From Heritage Player Scandal — Where's the Government Accountability?
item.description:
Said by: Dr. Mohammed Taufiq Johari, Youth and Sports Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED

On March 9, 2026, Youth and Sports Minister Dr. Mohammed Taufiq Johari called on the Football Association of Malaysia (FAM) to “take lessons” from the heritage player scandal and move forward with grassroots football development.

“The legal process has taken place and we accept the decision that has been made. We will now examine what follow-up steps need to be taken,” Taufiq said at an Iftar Ramadan event in Tikam Batu.

This follows the Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) upholding FIFA’s sanctions against seven players — Facundo Garcés, Rodrigo Holgado, Imanol Machuca, João Figueiredo, Gabriel Felipe, Jon Irazabal, and Héctor Hevel — who were found to have used forged documents to represent Malaysia internationally. All seven received 12-month suspensions. FIFA also overturned the results of three international matches and fined FAM CHF350,000 (RM1.8 million).

Critically: none of the seven players had any Malaysian roots. The “heritage player” label was itself a fiction.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS

This is not just a football scandal. It is a governance scandal that implicates the Malaysian government at the highest levels.

These seven players were granted Malaysian citizenship through official government channels. The Home Ministry, under Home Minister Datuk Seri Saifuddin Nasution Ismail, previously stated that all citizenship applications were “processed in strict accordance with Malaysian law” under Article 19 of the Federal Constitution and National Registration Department SOPs.

But if the documents were forged — as FIFA found, as CAS confirmed, and as the players were sanctioned for — then either:

  1. The government’s vetting process failed catastrophically, approving citizenship based on documents that could not withstand FIFA’s scrutiny, or
  2. Someone inside the system knew the documents were fraudulent and approved them anyway. Either way, the government has a serious accountability problem. And the Sports Minister’s response? Learn lessons and focus on grassroots.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT

“Learn lessons and move on” is the Malaysian government’s universal get-out-of-jail-free card. It is what they say when they want the public to stop asking uncomfortable questions.

Let’s be very clear about what the Sports Minister is not saying:

  • He is not naming who in government approved the fraudulent citizenship applications.
  • He is not calling for an investigation into the Home Ministry’s vetting process.
  • He is not explaining how forged documents passed through NRD’s “standard operating procedures.”
  • He is not demanding accountability from Saifuddin Nasution, whose ministry signed off on these citizenships. Instead, he is telling FAM — an independent sports body — to “learn lessons.” FAM did not grant these men citizenship. The government did.

The Sports Minister is deflecting blame onto football administrators while the actual institutional failure — a government ministry approving citizenship based on forged documents — goes completely unexamined.

And let’s not forget: the Home Ministry’s earlier claim that everything was done “lawfully” is now directly contradicted by an international sports court’s finding of document fraud. Someone is lying. Nobody in government seems interested in finding out who.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES

This pattern — government complicity followed by blame-shifting to non-governmental actors — is a PH speciality:

  • MACC/Azam Baki scandal (2025-2026): Bloomberg exposed shareholding irregularities. Anwar’s response? A “special committee” — not a suspension, not an independent inquiry. When DAP pushed for more, they were told to wait.
  • 1MDB under PH: Anwar halved Najib’s sentence while telling the public the debt was being managed. The rakyat still pays RM50 billion.
  • Lynas rare earth (2026): The government renewed Lynas’s license for 10 years despite unresolved radioactive waste issues. When pressed, ministers said the “regulatory process” was followed. In each case, the formula is identical: bad thing happens on government’s watch → government says process was followed → when process is shown to have failed → government says learn lessons and move forward. Rinse. Repeat.

🎯 PH CALLOUT

You came to power promising institutional reform and accountability. You said the days of rubber-stamp government approvals were over. You said transparency would be your hallmark.

Seven men with zero Malaysian roots were given Malaysian citizenship under your watch. They played for the national team using forged documents that your Home Ministry certified as lawful. When FIFA caught the fraud, Malaysia was sanctioned, fined, and humiliated on the international stage.

And your response is to tell football administrators to “focus on grassroots”?

Who in the Home Ministry approved these applications? What happened during the vetting process? Will there be an internal investigation? Will Saifuddin Nasution answer for this?

Until you answer those questions, “learn lessons and move on” is just another way of saying: we got caught and we’d rather you forget about it.

Sources: Scoop.my / Bernama | Malaysiakini | Bernama Timeline | Malay Mail | The Star / Home Ministry

item.title: The Ultimate Betrayal: Anwar Built Hope, Sold It to UMNO, and Called It Reform
item.description:
Said by: Compilation: CSIS, Toda, CNA, East Asia Forum, ISEAS, Amnesty, HRW, Freedom House

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: After three years in power, the verdict from international watchdogs, think tanks, and analysts is unanimous: Anwar Ibrahim has failed to deliver on his reform agenda.

  • CSIS: ‘The Death of Reformasi.’
  • Toda Peace Institute: ‘Making things worse.’
  • Amnesty International: ‘Betrayed reform pledges.’
  • HRW: ‘Reform agenda stalled.’
  • Freedom House: ‘Partly Free’ (unchanged).
  • CNA: ‘Perfect storm’ of crises.
  • East Asia Forum: ‘Reform aspirations clashed with political realities.’
  • ISEAS: ‘Needs rigour, fairness and self-awareness.’ 🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: This is not one critic, one perspective, or one partisan attack. This is a CONSENSUS across the world’s most respected institutions that Anwar’s reform project has failed. When CSIS in Washington, Amnesty in London, ISEAS in Singapore, Toda in Tokyo, and Freedom House all reach the same conclusion independently, it’s not bias — it’s the truth.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: Anwar had EVERYTHING: a personal narrative of suffering, a movement built on hope, a mandate from voters, parliamentary numbers, international goodwill, and decades of experience. He had more political capital than any incoming PM in Malaysian history. And he spent it ALL on maintaining power through UMNO’s patronage network rather than delivering the reforms that justified his entire political existence. This isn’t a failure of circumstance — it’s a failure of character.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Malaysia has had reform movements before. The 1998 Reformasi. The 2008 political tsunami. The 2018 PH victory. Each time, hope surged and was betrayed. But Anwar’s betrayal is the most complete because he was the personification of hope itself. When the symbol of reform becomes the agent of its destruction, there is nothing left to believe in.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: You asked for our trust. We gave it. You asked for our votes. We delivered them. You asked for patience. We showed it. And in return, you gave us UMNO as your partner, corruption in your office, repression of your critics, and a cost of living that gets worse every month. The 200+ entries in this database are not opposition propaganda — they are YOUR record, documented with YOUR government’s data and assessed by the world’s most respected institutions. This is what ‘Malaysia Madani’ actually looks like. This is your legacy. Own it.

Sources: CSIS — The Death of Reformasi | Toda Peace Institute — Report 184 | CNA — Anwar Faces Graft Crisis | East Asia Forum — Reform Aspirations | HRW — Reform Agenda Stalled | Freedom House — Malaysia | Amnesty International via Malay Mail

item.title: Zafrul Testifying in Muhyiddin Corruption Trial — The Man Who Served Both Sides Takes the Stand
item.description:
Said by: Tengku Zafrul Abdul Aziz / Muhyiddin Yassin Defence Team

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-09

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: Tengku Zafrul is scheduled to testify in the corruption trial of former PM Muhyiddin Yassin, who faces charges of soliciting RM232.5 million in bribes for Bersatu through the Jana Wibawa programme. Zafrul served as Muhyiddin’s Finance Minister during the period the alleged offences occurred (March 2020 to August 2021). The defence team has also signalled plans to call tycoon Syed Mokhtar to testify. Hearing dates are set through August 2026.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: Zafrul was Finance Minister when the Jana Wibawa contracts were allegedly used as a bribery vehicle. He is now simultaneously Anwar’s Senior Political Advisor and a witness in the trial of the PM whose government he served. The potential for conflicts of interest is staggering: the witness serves the current government, which has political interest in the conviction of the former PM. His testimony could be shaped — or perceived as shaped — by his current loyalties.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: In any other democracy, a senior government advisor being a key witness in a former boss’s corruption trial would trigger recusal protocols, independent counsel considerations, or at minimum a temporary leave from government duties. In Malaysia, nobody bats an eye. Zafrul will testify about financial decisions he oversaw as FM, then walk back to his office as Anwar’s advisor. The institutional boundaries that should prevent this don’t exist.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: Malaysia’s political-judicial overlap has a long, ugly history. The 1988 judicial crisis, Anwar’s own trials, and the Zahid DNAA all demonstrate what happens when political interests contaminate legal proceedings. Zafrul’s dual role as current advisor and trial witness is the latest chapter.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: Your senior advisor served as finance minister to the man you’re prosecuting. He oversaw the budget during the alleged corruption period. He is now your closest economic advisor. Malaysians are supposed to believe his testimony won’t be influenced by his current employer? Either put Zafrul on leave during the trial or explain how this isn’t a textbook conflict of interest.

Sources: Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] Anwar Dakwa Lobi AS PKR 2016 'Hanya Soal Pembebasannya' — Dokumen 84 Muka Surat Tunjuk Ia Serukan Washington Campur Tangan Terhadap Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, MalaysiaNow menerbitkan butiran dokumen 84 muka surat bertajuk White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, disediakan bersama oleh Sivarasa Rasiah dari PKR dan perunding Amerika Jared Genser dari Perseus Strategies pada April 2016. Dokumen itu, yang disahkan seorang AP kanan PKR telah disampaikan kepada beberapa ahli Kongres AS, menyeru pentadbiran Obama supaya lebih mengambil berat politik domestik Malaysia, menegur kerajaan Najib secara terbuka, dan menuntut pembebasan Anwar. Anwar sebelum ini menyatakan pengupahan Genser oleh PKR “semata-mata untuk mendesak pembebasannya dari penjara.”

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

Pendedahan ini sangat meletup dari segi politik kerana kerajaan Anwar kini mendakwa keluarga mendiang Daim Zainuddin — khususnya balunya Na’imah Abdul Khalid — di bawah undang-undang berkaitan “menggulingkan kerajaan” kerana mengupah firma PR asing. Polis melancarkan siasatan di bawah Seksyen 124B terhadap Na’imah berdasarkan dakwaan kerja komunikasinya adalah sebahagian daripada komplot menumbangkan Anwar. Namun PKR melakukan perkara yang sama persis pada 2016: mengupah perunding asing untuk melobi kerajaan asing mengenakan tekanan ke atas Perdana Menteri Malaysia yang sedang memerintah. Dokumen itu jauh melampaui kes peribadi Anwar — ia menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, ekonomi, dan hala tuju dasar Malaysia merentasi 84 muka surat, dan diserahkan sendiri kepada penggubal undang-undang AS.

💩 Mengapa Ia Karut

Dakwaan Anwar bahawa lobi 2016 itu “hanya soal pembebasannya” runtuh di bawah berat dokumen itu sendiri. Dokumen itu menyerang tadbir urus Najib di setiap bidang — ekonomi, badan kehakiman, kebebasan akhbar, dan hala tuju dasar. Ia menyeru Presiden AS menegur secara terbuka sebuah kerajaan berdaulat. Nurul Izzah menulis rencana pendapat bertajuk What Obama must do in Malaysia, menuduh Najib meninggalkan negara dengan “peningkatan pergeseran sektarian, ketidakseimbangan ekonomi dan persekitaran subur untuk pertumbuhan ekstremisme.” Genser menuduh Najib melakukan “persempadanan semula melampau” dan mengekalkan kuasa melalui dasar memecahbelahkan. Ini bukan kempen banduan hati nurani — ia operasi politik menyeluruh yang direka untuk mendapatkan Washington menjejaskan kestabilan kerajaan yang sedang memerintah. Perbuatan sama yang Anwar kini panggil pengkhianatan apabila dilakukan oleh lawannya.

📜 Kes-kes Terdahulu

Parti politik Malaysia mempunyai sejarah panjang meraih sokongan asing ketika menjadi pembangkang, kemudian menjerit kedaulatan apabila berkuasa. Anwar sendiri memupuk hubungan rapat dengan badan pemikir Washington, media Barat, dan pertubuhan hak asasi antarabangsa semasa bertahun-tahun sebagai ketua pembangkang. Kemenangan pilihan raya PH 2018 sebahagiannya dibantu oleh tekanan antarabangsa terhadap Najib mengenai 1MDB. Kini dalam kerajaan, Anwar telah mempersenjatakan taktik yang sama persis terhadap keluarga Daim, menggunakan siasatan polis di bawah undang-undang era hasutan dan secara terbuka mendakwa “Zionis” dan “bankir” berada di sebalik pelan PR Na’imah. Corak ini setua politik Malaysia: lobi pembangkang adalah “advokasi untuk demokrasi,” tetapi sebaik sahaja anda memegang kuasa, ia menjadi “komplot untuk menggulingkan kerajaan.”

🎯 Teguran Kepada PH

Anda berkempen atas ketelusan, kedaulatan undang-undang, dan hak untuk berbeza pendapat. Parti anda sendiri mengupah perunding asing untuk meminta kuasa besar campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia — lengkap dengan dokumen 84 muka surat yang menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, dan hala tuju dasar negara anda, diserahkan tangan kepada ahli Kongres AS. Anda kini mendakwa seorang balu warga emas kerana mengupah firma PR, mendakwa “Zionis” di sebalik komplot menggulingkan anda, dan menggunakan Seksyen 124B terhadap aktivis antirasuah dan masyarakat sivil. Jika mengupah perunding asing untuk menekan kerajaan Malaysia adalah jenayah terhadap demokrasi berparlimen, maka mulakan dengan parti anda sendiri. Jika bukan, gugurkan pertuduhan terhadap Na’imah Khalid dan berhenti menggunakan polis untuk menggertak pengkritik anda.

Sumber: MalaysiaNow — Dokumen didedahkan (8 Mac) | MalaysiaNow — PKR upah perunding asing (2 Mac) | MalaysiaNow — Dakwaan ‘komplot Zionis’ dikecam (3 Mac) | Reuters — PM beritahu parlimen tentang komplot (3 Mac) | Reuters — PM disaman atas dakwaan komplot (6 Mac)

item.title: [BM] Anwar Dakwa Lobi AS PKR 2016 'Hanya Untuk Pembebasannya' — Dosier 84 Muka Surat Tunjuk Ia Seru Washington Campuri Hal Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, MalaysiaNow menerbitkan butiran dosier 84 muka surat bertajuk White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, disediakan bersama oleh Sivarasa Rasiah PKR dan perunding Amerika Jared Genser daripada Perseus Strategies pada April 2016. Dokumen itu, yang disahkan oleh Ahli Parlimen kanan PKR telah diserahkan kepada beberapa ahli Kongres AS, menyeru pentadbiran Obama mengambil lebih perhatian terhadap politik domestik Malaysia, menegur kerajaan Najib secara terbuka, dan menuntut pembebasan Anwar. Anwar sebelum ini menyatakan bahawa pengupahan Genser oleh PKR “hanya untuk mendesak pembebasannya dari penjara.”

🔥 Kenapa Ini Penting

Pendedahan ini letupan politik kerana kerajaan Anwar kini mendakwa keluarga mendiang Daim Zainuddin — khususnya balunya Na’imah Khalid — di bawah undang-undang berkaitan “gulingkan kerajaan” kerana mengupah firma PR asing. Polis melancarkan siasatan di bawah Seksyen 124B terhadap Na’imah berdasarkan dakwaan bahawa kerja komunikasinya adalah sebahagian daripada komplot untuk menggulingkan Anwar. Namun PKR melakukan perkara yang sama tepat pada 2016: mengupah perunding asing untuk melobi kerajaan asing mengenakan tekanan terhadap perdana menteri Malaysia yang sedang berkuasa. Dosier itu melampaui kes peribadi Anwar — ia menyerang tadbir urus, kehakiman, ekonomi, dan hala tuju dasar Malaysia merentasi 84 muka surat.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Dakwaan Anwar bahawa lobi 2016 “hanya mengenai pembebasannya” runtuh di bawah berat dokumen itu sendiri. Dosier itu menyerang tadbir urus Najib merentasi setiap bidang — ekonomi, kehakiman, kebebasan akhbar, dan hala tuju dasar. Ia menyeru presiden AS menegur kerajaan berdaulat secara terbuka. Nurul Izzah menulis rencana bertajuk What Obama must do in Malaysia. Ini bukan kempen banduan hati nurani — ia operasi politik menyeluruh untuk mendapatkan Washington menggugat kestabilan kerajaan yang sedang berkuasa. Perbuatan yang sama Anwar kini panggil pengkhianatan apabila dilakukan oleh lawannya.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Parti politik Malaysia mempunyai sejarah panjang mendapatkan sokongan asing apabila menjadi pembangkang, kemudian menangis kedaulatan apabila berkuasa. Anwar sendiri memupuk hubungan mendalam dengan badan pemikir Washington, media Barat, dan pertubuhan hak asasi antarabangsa semasa tahun-tahunnya sebagai pemimpin pembangkang. Kemenangan PH 2018 sebahagiannya dibantu oleh tekanan antarabangsa terhadap Najib berhubung 1MDB. Kini berkuasa, Anwar mempersenjatakan taktik yang sama tepat terhadap keluarga Daim. Coraknya setua politik Malaysia: lobi pembangkang adalah “advokasi untuk demokrasi,” tetapi sebaik sahaja anda berkuasa, ia menjadi “komplot gulingkan kerajaan.”

🎯 Seruan Kepada PH

Anda berkempen atas ketelusan, kedaulatan undang-undang, dan hak membantah. Parti anda sendiri mengupah perunding asing untuk meminta kuasa besar campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia — lengkap dengan dosier 84 muka surat menyerang tadbir urus, kehakiman, dan hala tuju dasar negara anda, diserahkan tangan kepada ahli Kongres AS. Anda kini mendakwa balu tua kerana mengupah firma PR, dakwa “Zionis” di sebalik komplot menggulingkan anda, dan guna Seksyen 124B terhadap aktivis antirasuah dan masyarakat sivil. Jika mengupah perunding asing mengenakan tekanan terhadap kerajaan Malaysia adalah jenayah, mulakan dengan parti anda sendiri. Jika bukan, gugurkan tuduhan terhadap Na’imah Khalid.

Sumber: MalaysiaNow — Dosier didedahkan | MalaysiaNow — PKR upah perunding asing | Reuters

item.title: [BM] Anwar Dakwa Lobi PKR Di AS Pada 2016 'Hanya Soal Pembebasannya' — Dosier 84 Muka Surat Tunjuk Ia Desak Washington Campuri Urusan Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, MalaysiaNow mendedahkan kandungan dosier 84 muka surat bertajuk White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, yang disediakan oleh pemimpin kanan PKR Sivarasa Rasiah bersama konsultan Amerika Jared Genser dari Perseus Strategies pada April 2016. Dokumen ini, yang disahkan seorang Ahli Parlimen kanan PKR telah dihantar kepada beberapa ahli Kongres AS, mendesak pentadbiran Obama untuk lebih campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia, menegur kerajaan Najib secara terbuka, dan menuntut pembebasan Anwar. Anwar sebelum ini mendakwa pengambilan Genser oleh PKR adalah “semata-mata untuk mendesak pembebasannya dari penjara.”

🔥 Kenapa Ini Penting

Pendedahan ini bersifat letupan dari segi politik kerana kerajaan Anwar kini sedang mendakwa keluarga mendiang Daim Zainuddin — khususnya balu beliau Na’imah Khalid — di bawah undang-undang berkaitan “menjatuhkan kerajaan” kerana melibatkan firma PR asing. Polis melancarkan siasatan di bawah Seksyen 124B terhadap Na’imah berdasarkan dakwaan bahawa kerja komunikasi beliau adalah sebahagian daripada komplot untuk menumbangkan Anwar. Namun PKR melakukan perkara yang sama tepat pada 2016: mengupah konsultan asing untuk melobi kerajaan asing agar menekan Perdana Menteri Malaysia yang sedang memerintah. Dosier itu jauh melampaui kes peribadi Anwar — ia menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, ekonomi, dan hala tuju dasar Malaysia merentasi 84 muka surat, dan dihantar terus kepada ahli-ahli Kongres AS.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Dakwaan Anwar bahawa lobi 2016 itu “hanya tentang pembebasannya” runtuh di bawah berat dokumen itu sendiri. Dosier itu menyerang tadbir urus Najib dari setiap sudut — ekonomi, badan kehakiman, kebebasan akhbar, dan hala tuju dasar. Ia mendesak Presiden AS untuk menegur secara terbuka sebuah kerajaan berdaulat. Nurul Izzah menulis artikel bertajuk What Obama must do in Malaysia, menuduh Najib meninggalkan negara dengan “peningkatan perbalahan perkauman, ketidakseimbangan ekonomi dan suasana subur untuk pertumbuhan ekstremisme.” Genser menuduh Najib melakukan “gerrymandering melampau” dan mengekalkan kuasa melalui dasar-dasar yang memecahbelahkan. Ini bukan kempen tahanan hati nurani — ia adalah operasi politik menyeluruh yang direka untuk mendapatkan Washington bagi menjejaskan kestabilan kerajaan yang sedang memerintah. Perbuatan yang sama yang kini Anwar panggil pengkhianatan apabila dilakukan lawannya.

📜 Kes-Kes Sebelum Ini

Parti politik Malaysia mempunyai sejarah panjang meminta sokongan asing apabila menjadi pembangkang, kemudian menangis kedaulatan apabila berkuasa. Anwar sendiri memupuk hubungan rapat dengan badan pemikir Washington, media Barat, dan pertubuhan hak asasi antarabangsa semasa menjadi ketua pembangkang selama bertahun-tahun. Kemenangan PH pada PRU 2018 sebahagiannya dibantu oleh tekanan antarabangsa terhadap Najib berhubung 1MDB. Kini berkuasa, Anwar telah mempersenjatakan taktik yang sama terhadap keluarga Daim, mengerahkan siasatan polis di bawah undang-undang era hasutan dan secara terbuka mendakwa “Zionis” dan “jurubank” berada di sebalik rancangan PR Na’imah. Polanya setua politik Malaysia: lobi pembangkang adalah “advokasi untuk demokrasi,” tetapi saat anda pegang kuasa, ia menjadi “komplot untuk menjatuhkan kerajaan.”

🎯 Panggilan Kepada PH

Anda berkempen atas nama ketelusan, kedaulatan undang-undang, dan hak untuk bersuara. Parti anda sendiri mengupah konsultan asing untuk meminta kuasa besar campur tangan dalam politik Malaysia — lengkap dengan dosier 84 muka surat yang menyerang tadbir urus, badan kehakiman, dan hala tuju dasar negara anda sendiri, dihantar terus kepada ahli Kongres AS. Anda kini mendakwa seorang balu tua kerana mengupah firma PR, mendakwa “Zionis” berada di sebalik komplot untuk menumbangkan anda, dan menggunakan Seksyen 124B terhadap aktivis antirasuah dan masyarakat sivil. Jika melibatkan konsultan asing untuk menekan kerajaan Malaysia adalah jenayah terhadap demokrasi berparlimen, mulakan dengan parti anda sendiri. Jika tidak, gugurkan pertuduhan terhadap Na’imah Khalid dan berhenti menggunakan polis untuk menakut-nakutkan pengkritik anda.

item.title: [BM] Anwar Isyarat Keterbukaan Dengan PAS — Orang Yang Lawan Mereka Kini Mendekati Mereka
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Pada 8 Mac 2026, sambil mempertahankan angka pemulihan antirasuah kerajaannya sebanyak RM15.5 bilion, Anwar Ibrahim serentak mengisyaratkan keterbukaan untuk penglibatan lebih rapat dengan PAS — parti Islam yang gabungannya dibina untuk ditentang. Ini datang ketika DAP secara terbuka menyemak ikatan gabungannya dan PH baru sahaja dihapuskan dalam pilihan raya negeri Sabah, hanya memenangi 1 daripada 20 kerusi.

🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING: Keseluruhan premis Pakatan Harapan ialah ia mewakili alternatif kepada ekstremisme agama PAS dan naungan etno-nasionalis UMNO. Kesanggupan Anwar mendekati PAS — walaupun DAP, rakan gabungan paling setia, sedang kehilangan sokongan — mengisyaratkan kelangsungan pilihan raya telah mengatasi ideologi sepenuhnya. Jika PH dibina untuk menentang PAS, dan pemimpin PH kini mendekati PAS, apakah sebenarnya pendirian PH lagi?

💩 KENAPA IA KARUT: Daripada membaiki keretakan dalaman yang menyebabkan kekalahan di Sabah — peminggiran DAP, perpecahan Rafizi PKR, janji manifesto tidak ditunaikan — Anwar sedang mendekati akomodasi politik yang sama yang pernah dikutuknya. Ini bukan pragmatisme. Ia keputusasaan berpakaian kenegarawanan. Anda tidak membaiki gabungan yang dibina atas reformasi dengan menjemput parti anti-reformasi ke meja. Anda membaikinya dengan benar-benar melakukan reformasi.

📜 KES TERDAHULU: Mahathir mendekati PAS secara senyap semasa PH 1.0, menyumbang kepada keruntuhan gabungan dalam Langkah Sheraton 2020. UMNO berulang kali bermain-main dengan PAS apabila sesuai secara politik, membentuk Muafakat Nasional pada 2019. Setiap gabungan Malaysia yang mendekati PAS akhirnya membuat konsesi terhadap tadbir urus sekular. Anwar melihat buku panduan ini memusnahkan PH 1.0 — dan kini menjalankannya sendiri.

🎯 PANGGILAN PH: Anda menghabiskan PRU15 memberitahu rakyat Malaysia bahawa PAS adalah ancaman kepada Malaysia pelbagai budaya. Rakan gabungan anda sendiri berarak menentang politik PAS. Kini apabila anda kalah pilihan raya, PAS tiba-tiba layak didekati? Sama ada PAS ancaman kepada demokrasi Malaysia atau tidak. Pilih satu dan teguh. Pengundi anda layak mendapat konsistensi, bukan keputusasaan pilihan raya.

Sumber: The Vibes | The Star

Ini bukan pragmatisme. Ia keputusasaan berpakaian kenegarawanan. Anda tidak membetulkan gabungan yang dibina atas reformasi dengan menjemput parti antireformasi ke meja. UMNO berulang kali menggoda PAS bila sesuai secara politik, membentuk Muafakat Nasional pada 2019. Setiap gabungan Malaysia yang mendekati PAS akhirnya membuat konsesi terhadap tadbir urus sekular. Kini setelah kalah pilihan raya, PAS tiba-tiba layak didekati? Sama ada PAS ancaman kepada demokrasi Malaysia atau tidak. Pilih satu dan berpegang padanya. Pengundi anda layak mendapat konsistensi, bukan keputusasaan pilihan raya.

Sumber: The Vibes | The Star

item.title: [BM] PKR Keluarkan Surat Tunjuk Sebab Kepada Rafizi, Kemudian Berundur — Parti Tak Mampu Disiplinkan Pengkritik Paling Terkenalnya
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Pandan MP / Fuziah Salleh, PKR Secretary-General

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 19 Februari, AP Pandan Rafizi Ramli mendedahkan beliau menerima surat tunjuk sebab daripada Setiausaha Agung PKR Fuziah Salleh selepas memberitahu Sin Chew Daily beliau akan bertanding di Pandan pada PRU16 tetapi berkemungkinan bukan sebagai calon PKR. Rafizi menjawab bahawa maksud komennya “boleh difahami oleh sesiapa yang mahir bahasa Melayu” dan beliau bebas membuat rancangan sendiri selepas Parlimen dibubarkan. Pada 6 Mac, PKR menyampaikan keputusannya melalui emel — tiada tindakan diambil, hanya peringatan mematuhi perlembagaan parti dan kod etika. Pada 8 Mac, Rafizi secara terbuka menggambarkan ini sebagai “pusingan U,” berkata surat tunjuk sebab dikeluarkan “dengan niat memberikan beliau tendangan” tetapi parti akhirnya gentar.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Episod ini mendedahkan kereputan institusi dalam PKR — parti yang pernah melaungkan dirinya sebagai barisan hadapan reformasi. Surat tunjuk sebab sepatutnya menjadi permulaan proses disiplin, bukan ancaman persembahan diikuti undur senyap. Ketidakmampuan PKR sama ada melibatkan kritikannya secara bermakna atau menguatkuasakan mekanisme disiplinnya sendiri menunjukkan parti yang lumpuh — terlalu takut memecat pengkritik paling terkenalnya, tetapi terlalu sombong untuk mengakui dia ada betulnya.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

PKR mahu Rafizi pergi tetapi tiada keberanian melakukannya. Seperti yang Rafizi sendiri tunjukkan, memecatnya tidak akan menjejaskan kerusi parlimennya — hanya peletakan jawatan sukarela akan mencetuskan kekosongan. Jadi PKR terperangkap: pecat dia dan dia kekal di Parlimen sebagai agen bebas yang memalukan mereka setiap hari, atau berundur dan kelihatan lemah. Mereka pilih lemah. “Peringatan ikut peraturan parti” adalah setara politik nota Post-it pasif-agresif. Ini parti yang sama yang memberi kuliah negara tentang reformasi institusi dan tadbir urus baik sementara ia tidak mampu menguruskan proses disiplin dalaman asas tanpa tunduk di bawah tekanan.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

PKR mempunyai sejarah panjang dan tidak membanggakan pembersihan puak yang berselindung di sebalik disiplin — dan disiplin yang runtuh menjadi komedi. Parti memecat timbalan presidennya sendiri Azmin Ali pada 2020 selepas Langkah Sheraton, tetapi hanya selepas kerosakan berlaku. Rafizi sendiri pernah menjadi anak emas PKR — pemberi maklumat yang mendedahkan skandal Perbadanan Fidlot Nasional. Kini beliau suara parti yang paling menyusahkan.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anwar dan PKR menjanjikan rakyat Malaysia politik baru — telus, berprinsip, dan bertanggungjawab. Tetapi apabila bekas timbalan presiden anda sendiri secara terbuka mengatakan beliau tidak akan bertanding di bawah bendera anda, dan yang terbaik parti anda mampu hasilkan ialah surat tunjuk sebab diikuti emel peringatan yang lemah, anda bukan menjalankan parti politik — anda menguruskan situasi tebusan. ‘Reformasi’ pernah bermakna sesuatu. Kini ia bermakna menghantar emel bernada tegas dan berharap masalah hilang sendiri.

Sumber: FMT | Malaysiakini | Malay Mail | Bernama

item.title: [BM] Teresa Kok Kata Perpaduan Gabungan Lebih Penting Daripada RCI Terhadap SPRM — AP DAP Sendiri Jejaskan Desakan Akauntabiliti
item.description:
Said by: Teresa Kok, MP for Seputeh (DAP)

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Pada 8 Mac, AP Seputeh DAP Teresa Kok secara terbuka menyatakan bahawa mengekalkan perpaduan dalam kerajaan gabungan Madani lebih penting daripada desakan partinya sendiri untuk Suruhanjaya Siasatan Diraja (RCI) terhadap Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM). Ini datang beberapa hari selepas Setiausaha Agung DAP Anthony Loke memberitahu Malaysiakini respons kerajaan terhadap dakwaan salah laku SPRM adalah “tidak mencukupi” dan menyeru siasatan bebas.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

DAP adalah parti tunggal terbesar dalam gabungan pemerintah Anwar dengan 40 AP, dan keseluruhan identiti politiknya terletak pada reformasi, akauntabiliti, dan antirasuah. Apabila ahli parlimen belakang parti sendiri secara terbuka membelot daripada kepimpinan untuk mengutamakan kelangsungan gabungan berbanding akauntabiliti institusi, ia mengisyaratkan kempen tekanan dalaman sudah retak. Kenyataan Teresa Kok memberikan Anwar perlindungan politik untuk terus mengabaikan seruan RCI.

💩 Kenapa Ia Karut

Ini helah tertua dalam buku panduan gabungan: bingkaikan tuntutan akauntabiliti sebagai ancaman kepada kestabilan. Teresa Kok pada dasarnya berkata kerajaan tidak perlu dipegang kepada piawainya sendiri kerana berbuat demikian mungkin menggoncang perahu. Tetapi DAP tidak memasuki kerajaan untuk menstabilkan perahu — ia masuk untuk membaiki enjin. SPRM di bawah Azam Baki telah didakwa secara boleh dipercayai oleh Bloomberg menjalankan “mafia korporat.” Jika RCI terhadap itu terlalu menggoyahkan untuk gabungan, maka gabungan sudah gagal tujuan yang dinyatakannya. Perpaduan tanpa akauntabiliti hanyalah subahat dengan PR yang lebih baik.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Ini bukan kali pertama AP DAP secara terbuka melemahkan pendirian reformasi parti untuk melindungi keharmonian gabungan. Coraknya mendalam: DAP berdiam diri berbulan-bulan mengenai skandal pegangan saham pertama Azam Baki pada 2021-2022, kemudian memperbaharui kontraknya tiga kali selepas memasuki kerajaan.

🎯 Panggilan PH

Anda beritahu pengundi Malaysia anda adalah gabungan reformasi. Dan kini, apabila parti anda sendiri menuntut mekanisme akauntabiliti asas — RCI terhadap agensi antirasuah yang didakwa menjadi mafia korporat — AP anda sendiri kata perpaduan lebih penting. Jika DAP tidak mampu mempertahankan garis sendiri mengenai SPRM, untuk apa sebenarnya parti ini?

Sumber: NST | Reuters | Straits Times

item.title: Anwar Claims PKR's 2016 US Lobbying Was 'Only About His Release' — 84-Page Dossier Shows It Called for Washington to Intervene Against Malaysia
item.description:
Said by: Anwar Ibrahim, Prime Minister / Nurul Izzah Anwar, PKR Deputy President / Sivarasa Rasiah, PKR Senior Leader

Category: Politics

Date: 2026-03-08

📌 What Happened

On March 8, MalaysiaNow published details of an 84-page dossier titled White Paper on the case of Anwar Ibrahim: Citizen of Malaysia v. Government of Malaysia, prepared jointly by PKR’s Sivarasa Rasiah and American consultant Jared Genser of Perseus Strategies in April 2016. The document, which a senior PKR MP confirmed was delivered to several US Congress members, called on the Obama administration to take a greater interest in Malaysia’s domestic politics, publicly rebuke the Najib government, and demand Anwar’s release. Anwar had previously stated that PKR’s hiring of Genser was “solely to press for his release from prison.”

🔥 Why It Matters

The revelation is politically explosive because Anwar’s government is currently prosecuting the family of the late Daim Zainuddin — specifically his widow Na’imah Khalid — under laws related to “toppling the government” for engaging a foreign PR firm. Police launched a probe under Section 124B against Na’imah based on claims that her communications work was part of a plot to overthrow Anwar. Yet PKR did precisely the same thing in 2016: hired a foreign consultant to lobby a foreign government to apply pressure on the sitting Malaysian prime minister. The dossier went far beyond Anwar’s personal case — it attacked Malaysia’s governance, judiciary, economy, and policy direction across 84 pages, and was hand-delivered to US lawmakers.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar’s claim that the 2016 lobbying was “only about his release” collapses under the weight of the document itself. The dossier attacked Najib’s governance across every front — economy, judiciary, press freedom, and policy direction. It called for the US president to publicly rebuke a sovereign government. Nurul Izzah wrote an op-ed titled What Obama must do in Malaysia, accusing Najib of leaving the country with “increased sectarian strife, economic imbalances and a ripe environment for the growth of extremism.” Genser accused Najib of “extreme gerrymandering” and maintaining power through divisive policies. This was not a prisoner-of-conscience campaign — it was a comprehensive political operation designed to get Washington to destabilize the sitting government. The same act Anwar now calls treason when done by his opponents.

📜 Previous Cases

Malaysian political parties have a long history of courting foreign backing when in opposition, then crying sovereignty when in power. Anwar himself cultivated deep ties with Washington think tanks, Western media, and international human rights organizations during his years as opposition leader. PH’s 2018 election win was partly aided by international pressure on Najib over 1MDB. Now in government, Anwar has weaponized the exact same tactics against the Daim family, deploying police investigations under sedition-era laws and publicly claiming “Zionists” and “bankers” were behind Na’imah’s PR plan. The pattern is as old as Malaysian politics: opposition lobbying is “advocacy for democracy,” but the moment you hold power, it becomes “a plot to topple the government.”

🎯 PH Callout

You campaigned on transparency, rule of law, and the right to dissent. Your own party hired a foreign consultant to ask a superpower to intervene in Malaysian politics — complete with an 84-page dossier attacking your country’s governance, judiciary, and policy direction, hand-delivered to US Congress members. You now prosecute an elderly widow for hiring a PR firm, claim “Zionists” are behind a plot to overthrow you, and use Section 124B against anti-corruption activists and civil society. If engaging foreign consultants to pressure a Malaysian government is a crime against parliamentary democracy, then start with your own party. If it isn’t, drop the charges against Na’imah Khalid and stop using the police to intimidate your critics.
