item.title: RM200 Million SMUE Fund Allegedly Misappropriated — MACC Probes Selangor Senior Citizens' Scheme
item.description:
Said by: Amirudin Shari / MACC

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-16

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission launched an investigation into the alleged misappropriation of RM200 million from Selangor’s Skim Mesra Usia Emas (SMUE) — the state’s elderly welfare scheme. Multiple officials linked to the scheme were questioned. The SMUE fund was designed to provide financial assistance to Selangor’s senior citizens, making the alleged misappropriation particularly egregious — money meant for the elderly allegedly diverted elsewhere under PH’s watch.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: RM200 million is not a rounding error — it’s a massive sum allegedly stolen from a welfare programme for senior citizens. Selangor is PH’s crown jewel, the richest state, run continuously by PKR/PH since 2008. If RM200 million can go missing from an elderly welfare fund in a PH-controlled state, what does that say about PH’s claim to be the ‘clean governance’ coalition? The fund was supposed to help the most vulnerable. Instead, it may have helped insiders.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: PH has governed Selangor for nearly 18 years. This isn’t an inherited BN problem — this happened on PH’s watch, under PH’s appointees, in PH’s state. The party that built its brand on anti-corruption is facing a corruption probe in its safest state. Amirudin’s office has been conspicuously quiet about the investigation. No public statements demanding accountability. No suspension of officials. No independent audit announced. Silence.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: This joins the sand mining probe, the MBI asset freeze, and the unexplained wealth allegations as part of a pattern. Selangor under PH isn’t a model of clean governance — it’s a state where MACC keeps finding things. At some point, one investigation is an outlier; four investigations is a pattern.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: RM200 million from a senior citizens’ fund. In your state. Under your watch. With your appointees. If BN did this, you’d hold a national rally. Since it’s your state, you hold a press conference about waste management. Demand a full public audit of SMUE. Suspend the officials. And tell the rakyat where the money went.

Sources: FMT | Facebook/FMT

item.title: [BM] Rafizi Amaran: Dakwaan Farhash Jejaskan Kelayakan Antirasuah PM
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Economy Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-15

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Rafizi secara terbuka menggesa Anwar untuk berhadapan dengan dakwaan terhadap Farhash Wafa, memberi amaran bahawa CPI Malaysia mendatar pada 50 mata — skor yang sama seperti 2015 semasa kemuncak skandal 1MDB. Kata ia ‘amat berbahaya jika pentadbiran dilihat tidak konsisten dalam memerangi rasuah.’

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Apabila Menteri Ekonomi anda sendiri secara terbuka memberi amaran bahawa kelayakan antirasuah anda sedang runtuh, masalah itu tidak boleh dinafikan. Rafizi secara efektif memberitahu Anwar: keengganan anda bertindak terhadap Farhash secara terukur merosakkan skor rasuah negara. CPI 50 di bawah Anwar adalah sama seperti di bawah Najib semasa 1MDB — perbandingan itu sahaja sudah membinasakan.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Amaran Rafizi diabaikan; beliau kemudian dipinggirkan daripada kabinet. Menteri yang berkata benar dihukum, sementara pembantu yang dituduh rasuah dilindungi. Ini bukan reformasi — ia adalah buku panduan lama dalam bungkusan baru.

🎯 Teguran Kepada PH

Menteri paling cekap anda memberi amaran secara terbuka bahawa melindungi Farhash sedang memusnahkan kelayakan antirasuah anda. Respons anda adalah meminggirkan menteri dan melindungi pembantu. Dalam mana-mana kerajaan reformasi, itu terbalik. Dalam kerajaan anda, ia adalah prosedur operasi standard.

Sumber

  • The Vibes — Rafizi Mengenai Farhash

item.title: Rafizi Warns: Farhash Allegations Undermine PM's Anti-Corruption Credentials
item.description:
Said by: Rafizi Ramli, Economy Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-15

📌 What Happened

Rafizi publicly urged Anwar to confront allegations against Farhash Wafa, warning that Malaysia’s CPI flatlined at 50 points — the same score as 2015 during the peak 1MDB scandal. Said it’s ’extremely dangerous if the administration is seen as inconsistent in combating corruption.'

🔥 Why It Matters

When your own Economy Minister publicly warns that your anti-corruption credentials are collapsing, the problem is undeniable. Rafizi effectively told Anwar: your refusal to act against Farhash is measurably damaging the country’s corruption score. A CPI of 50 under Anwar is the same as under Najib during 1MDB — that comparison alone is devastating.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Rafizi’s warning was ignored; he was later sidelined from cabinet. The minister who told the truth was punished, while the aide accused of corruption was protected. This is not reform — it is the old playbook in new packaging.

🎯 PH Callout

Your most competent minister warned you publicly that protecting Farhash was destroying your anti-corruption credentials. Your response was to sideline the minister and protect the aide. In any reform government, that’s backwards. In yours, it’s standard operating procedure.

Sources

  • The Vibes — Rafizi on Farhash

item.title: [BM] Anwar Periksa Kerja Sendiri — PM Yang Juga Menteri Kewangan Bentangkan Bajet Dan Dakwa Ia Hebat
item.description:
Said by: Opposition / Budget Analysts

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-10

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Bajet 2026 dibentangkan oleh Anwar Ibrahim — sebagai Menteri Kewangan — kepada parlimen, di mana beliau duduk sebagai Perdana Menteri. Beliau kemudian mempertahankan bajetnya sendiri di parlimen, memuji pencapaiannya, dan menolak kritikan. Orang yang menulis peperiksaan juga orang yang memberikan markah.

🔥 Kenapa Ia Penting

Dalam mana-mana demokrasi yang berfungsi, fungsi kewangan mempunyai pengawasan bebas daripada kepimpinan politik. Apabila satu orang mengawal kedua-dua agenda politik dan dompet negara, tiada semakan bermakna terhadap keputusan fiskal. Peruntukan bajet menjadi alat politik tanpa penelitian bebas. Peranan Parlimen sebagai badan pengawasan bajet terjejas apabila PM/MK mengawal kedua-dua eksekutif dan agenda fiskal.

💩 Kenapa Ini Karut

Anwar mengkritik Najib SECARA KHUSUS kerana memegang kedua-dua portfolio PM dan MK, berhujah ia membolehkan 1MDB dengan menghapuskan pengawasan. Kemudian Anwar mengambil KEDUA-DUA portfolio sendiri. Apabila ditanya mengenai ini, respons beliau pada dasarnya ialah ‘percayalah, saya berbeza.’ Itu bukan reformasi institusi — ia adalah pengecualian peribadi. Kelemahan struktur yang sama yang membolehkan 1MDB wujud di bawah Anwar.

📜 Kes Terdahulu

Najib sebagai PM+MK: 1MDB berlaku. Mahathir sebagai PM: peranan Menteri Kewangan menyediakan sedikit pemisahan. Di bawah prinsip tadbir urus baik, pengawasan fiskal memerlukan kebebasan institusi, bukan kepercayaan peribadi. Singapura memisahkan peranan tersebut. UK memisahkan peranan tersebut. Kebanyakan demokrasi yang berfungsi memisahkan peranan tersebut.

🎯 Teguran Kepada PH

Anda dipilih kerana PM terakhir yang memegang kedua-dua portfolio mencuri berbilion. Penyelesaian anda untuk mencegah 1MDB seterusnya ialah… meniru kelemahan struktur yang sama. Anda memeriksa kerja sendiri, dan tidak mengejutkan, anda terus memberi diri sendiri A+. Lantik Menteri Kewangan berasingan atau berhenti berpura-pura reformasi institusi penting bagi anda.

Sumber

  • Reuters — Bajet Malaysia & Kos Sara Hidup

item.title: Anwar Marks His Own Homework — PM Who Is Also Finance Minister Presents Budget and Claims It's Great
item.description:
Said by: Opposition / Budget Analysts

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-10

📌 What Happened

Budget 2026 was presented by Anwar Ibrahim — as Finance Minister — to parliament, where he sits as Prime Minister. He then defended his own budget in parliament, praised its achievements, and dismissed criticism. The person who wrote the exam is also the person who grades it.

🔥 Why It Matters

In any functional democracy, the finance function has oversight independent from the political leadership. When one person controls both the political agenda and the national wallet, there is no meaningful check on fiscal decisions. Budget allocations become political tools without independent scrutiny. Parliament’s role as a budget oversight body is undermined when the PM/FM controls both the executive and the fiscal agenda.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Anwar criticised Najib SPECIFICALLY for holding both PM and FM portfolios, arguing it enabled 1MDB by removing oversight. Then Anwar took BOTH portfolios himself. When asked about this, his response was essentially ’trust me, I’m different.’ That’s not institutional reform — it’s personal exceptionalism. The same structural vulnerability that enabled 1MDB exists under Anwar.

📜 Previous Cases

Najib as PM+FM: 1MDB happened. Mahathir as PM: the Finance Minister role provided some separation. Under good governance principles, fiscal oversight requires institutional independence, not personal trust. Singapore separates the roles. The UK separates the roles. Most functional democracies separate the roles.

🎯 PH Callout

You were elected because the last PM who held both portfolios stole billions. Your solution to preventing the next 1MDB was… to replicate the exact same structural vulnerability. You’re marking your own homework, and unsurprisingly, you keep giving yourself A+. Appoint a separate Finance Minister or stop pretending institutional reform matters to you.

Sources

  • Reuters — Malaysia Budget & Living Costs

item.title: [BM] Tiong King Sing Hidang Arak Di Majlis Makan Malam Rasmi Pelancongan, Kemudian Berbohong Tentang Siapa Penganjurnya
item.description:
Said by: Tiong King Sing, Tourism, Arts and Culture Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-05

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU

Menteri Pelancongan, Seni dan Budaya Tiong King Sing dikecam pada Oktober 2025 selepas minuman beralkohol dihidangkan di majlis makan malam gala semasa Global Travel Meet — acara yang dianjurkan di bawah bendera Tourism Malaysia. Klip video menunjukkan bir dan wain dihidangkan kepada tetamu Muslim, menyebabkan beberapa orang meninggalkan lebih awal.

Tiong pada mulanya menafikan tanggungjawab, mendakwa sektor swasta menganjurkan jamuan dan ia “bukan sebahagian daripada program rasmi Tourism Malaysia.” Tetapi bekas Menteri Kesihatan Khairy Jamaluddin menyiarkan tangkapan skrin di Instagram menunjukkan Tourism Malaysia disenaraikan sebagai penganjur majlis makan malam gala, mengejek Tiong dengan “Liar, liar pants on fire.”

Anwar akhirnya mengeluarkan “amaran tegas” kepada Tiong tetapi tidak memecatnya.

🔥 KENAPA IA PENTING

Ini adalah seorang menteri yang berbohong secara rasmi mengenai acara kementeriannya sendiri, ditangkap dengan bukti dokumentari, dan menghadapi sifar akibat selain “amaran tegas.” Dalam kerajaan yang menjanjikan integriti dan akauntabiliti, seorang menteri yang berbohong secara terbuka dan ditangkap sepatutnya menghadapi akibat sebenar — bukan tepukan di pergelangan tangan.

Insiden itu juga mendedahkan percanggahan mendalam dalam pengurusan gabungan Anwar. Tiong dari GPS (Gabungan Parti Sarawak), rakan gabungan kritikal. Memecatnya berisiko kehilangan sokongan Sarawak. Jadi akauntabiliti mengambil tempat belakang kepada aritmetik gabungan.

💩 KENAPA INI KARUT

Pembelaan Tiong adalah kelas induk dalam memanipulasi. Logo Tourism Malaysia ada di latar belakang acara. Kakitangan Tourism Malaysia hadir. Tetapi entah bagaimana ia adalah kesalahan “sektor swasta.” Apabila Khairy mengeluarkan bukti, Tiong beralih kepada menyatakan “penyesalan mendalam” tanpa benar-benar memohon maaf.

Dan respons Anwar? “Amaran tegas.” Anwar yang sama yang pernah berjanji menteri-menterinya akan dipegang kepada standard tertinggi. Seorang menteri yang berbohong secara terbuka mengenai acaranya sendiri mendapat tamparan ringan. Jika ini menteri BN di bawah Najib, PH akan menuntut peletakan jawatan dalam 24 jam.

📜 KES TERDAHULU

Tiong King Sing adalah menteri yang sama yang menjerit “Tahu tak siapa saya?” di lapangan terbang pada Februari 2025 — corak hak istimewa dan keangkuhan. Beliau juga sebelum ini terlibat dalam kontroversi berkaitan pengambilan alkohol sebelum insiden gala ini. Orang ini mempunyai rekod memalukan kerajaan dan menghadapi sifar akibat sebenar.

Di bawah BN, menteri yang berbohong mengenai acara awam dikoyak-koyak oleh pembangkang ketika itu. Amnesia terpilih PH mengenai standard akauntabiliti adalah tema berulang.

🎯 TEGURAN KEPADA PH

PH menjanjikan Kerajaan Madani — kerajaan bertamadun yang dibina atas integriti. Seorang menteri yang berbohong tentang siapa menganjurkan acara rasmi, ditangkap basah, dan hanya menghadapi “amaran tegas” bukan integriti. Ia adalah kekebalan. Sama ada standard anda terpakai kepada semua menteri anda — termasuk rakan gabungan dari Sarawak — atau ia tidak bermakna apa-apa. Tiong sepatutnya digugurkan daripada Kabinet. Hakikat bahawa dia tidak memberitahu rakyat Malaysia segala-galanya yang mereka perlu tahu tentang di mana kelangsungan gabungan berada berbanding akauntabiliti.

Sumber: Malay Mail | CNA | SCMP | MalaysiaNow | The Star

item.title: Tiong King Sing Serves Alcohol at Official Tourism Gala, Then Lies About Who Organised It
item.description:
Said by: Tiong King Sing, Tourism, Arts and Culture Minister

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-10-05

📌 WHAT HAPPENED

Tourism, Arts and Culture Minister Tiong King Sing came under fire in October 2025 after alcoholic beverages were served at a gala dinner during the Global Travel Meet — an event organised under the Tourism Malaysia banner. Video clips showed beer and wine being served to Muslim guests, prompting several to leave early.

Tiong initially denied responsibility, claiming the private sector organised the catering and that it was “not part of Tourism Malaysia’s official programme.” But former Health Minister Khairy Jamaluddin posted screenshots on Instagram showing Tourism Malaysia was listed as the organiser of the gala dinner, mocking Tiong with “Liar, liar pants on fire.”

Anwar eventually issued a “stern warning” to Tiong but did not sack him.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS

This is a minister lying on record about his own ministry’s event, getting caught with documentary evidence, and facing zero consequences beyond a “stern warning.” In a government that promised integrity and accountability, a minister who lies publicly and gets caught should face real consequences — not a pat on the wrist.

The incident also exposed the deep contradictions in Anwar’s coalition management. Tiong is from GPS (Gabungan Parti Sarawak), a critical coalition partner. Sacking him would risk losing Sarawak’s support. So accountability takes a back seat to coalition arithmetic.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT

Tiong’s defence was a masterclass in gaslighting. The Tourism Malaysia logo was on the event backdrop. Tourism Malaysia staff were present. But somehow it was the “private sector’s” fault. When Khairy produced the receipts, Tiong pivoted to expressing “deep regret” without actually apologising.

And Anwar’s response? A “stern warning.” The same Anwar who once promised that his ministers would be held to the highest standards. A minister who lies publicly about his own event gets a slap on the wrist. If this were a BN minister under Najib, PH would have demanded a resignation within 24 hours.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES

Tiong King Sing is the same minister who screamed “Do you know who I am?” at an airport in February 2025 — a pattern of entitlement and arrogance. He was also previously embroiled in controversies linked to alcohol consumption before this gala incident. The man has a track record of embarrassing the government and facing no real consequences.

Under BN, ministers who lied about public events were torn apart by the then-opposition. PH’s selective amnesia about accountability standards is a recurring theme.

🎯 PH CALLOUT

PH promised Kerajaan Madani — a civilised government built on integrity. A minister who lies about who organised an official event, gets caught red-handed, and faces only a “stern warning” is not integrity. It’s impunity. Either your standards apply to all your ministers — including coalition partners from Sarawak — or they mean nothing. Tiong should have been dropped from Cabinet. The fact that he wasn’t tells Malaysians everything they need to know about where coalition survival ranks versus accountability.

Sources: Malay Mail | CNA | SCMP | MalaysiaNow | The Star

item.title: [BM] Farhash Wafa Dibebaskan SPRM Atas Perlombongan Sabah — Muda Kecam 'Cuba Gembirakan PM'
item.description:
Said by: Azam Baki, MACC Chief Commissioner

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-09-09

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

SPRM membebaskan bekas pembantu Anwar, Farhash Wafa, atas skandal perlombongan Sabah, walaupun Bloomberg mendakwa Anwar mengarahkan SPRM supaya tidak menyiasat. Muda menuduh ketua SPRM Azam Baki ‘cuba bertahan dengan menggembirakan PM.’

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

Apabila pembantu politik PM sendiri dituduh rasuah dalam urus niaga perlombongan dan agensi antirasuah membebaskan mereka tanpa penjelasan awam yang boleh dipercayai, kebebasan agensi tersebut dipersoalkan. Dakwaan Bloomberg — bahawa Anwar campur tangan secara langsung untuk menghentikan siasatan — adalah letupan besar. Jika benar, ia bermakna pejuang antirasuah menghalang siasatan antirasuah. Jika palsu, kerajaan tidak memberikan bukti untuk menyangkalnya.

💩 Mengapa Ia Karut

Walau bagaimana pun, kredibiliti SPRM hancur. Agensi antirasuah yang tidak boleh menyiasat lingkungan dalaman PM bukan agensi antirasuah — ia adalah alat politik. Polanya jelas: sekutu dibebaskan, pengkritik disiasat.

🎯 Teguran PH

Agensi antirasuah anda membebaskan pembantu anda sementara Bloomberg melaporkan anda mengarahkan mereka supaya tidak menyiasat. Anda tidak menafikan laporan Bloomberg dengan bukti. Anda tidak menjelaskan mengapa pembebasan SPRM boleh dipercayai. Anda hanya bergerak dan berharap tiada siapa yang perasan. Kami perasan.

Sumber

  • MalaysiaNow — Farhash Dibebaskan
  • Malaysiakini — SPRM & Farhash

item.title: Farhash Wafa Cleared by MACC Over Sabah Mining — Muda Slams 'Pleasing the PM'
item.description:
Said by: Azam Baki, MACC Chief Commissioner

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-09-09

📌 What Happened

MACC cleared Anwar’s former aide Farhash Wafa over the Sabah mining scandal, despite Bloomberg alleging Anwar ordered MACC not to investigate. Muda accused MACC chief Azam Baki of ’trying to survive by pleasing the PM.'

🔥 Why It Matters

When a PM’s own political aide is accused of corruption in a mining deal and the anti-corruption agency clears them without a credible public explanation, the agency’s independence is in question. Bloomberg’s allegation — that Anwar directly intervened to stop the investigation — is explosive. If true, it means the anti-corruption crusader is obstructing anti-corruption investigations. If false, the government has not provided evidence to refute it.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Either way, MACC’s credibility is shattered. An anti-graft agency that cannot investigate the PM’s inner circle is not an anti-graft agency — it is a political tool. The pattern is clear: allies get cleared, critics get investigated.

🎯 PH Callout

Your anti-corruption agency cleared your aide while Bloomberg reports you told them not to investigate. You haven’t denied the Bloomberg report with evidence. You haven’t explained why MACC’s clearing is credible. You’ve just moved on and hoped nobody would notice. We noticed.

Sources

  • MalaysiaNow — Farhash Cleared
  • Malaysiakini — MACC & Farhash

item.title: [BM] Percanggahan Gabungan Anwar: PM Reformis, TPM Korup, Dan Parti Yang Membolehkan 1MDB
item.description:
Said by: Multiple analysts and commentators

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-09-01

Gabungan Yang Mustahil

Anwar Ibrahim mentadbir Malaysia melalui gabungan yang menjadikan reformasi mustahil secara struktur. Lelaki yang berkempen selama berdekad menentang rasuah kini bergantung kepada parti yang membolehkan kleptokrasi terbesar dunia.

Watak-Watak Utama

  • Anwar Ibrahim (PKR): Membina kerjayanya atas reformasi, antirasuah, dan tadbir urus bersih.
  • Ahmad Zahid Hamidi (UMNO): Timbalan PM. Menghadapi 47 pertuduhan rasuah. Semuanya digugurkan.
  • DAP: Suara reformasi paling konsisten dalam gabungan. Dipinggirkan secara sistematik dalam rombakan Disember 2025.
  • UMNO: Parti Najib. Mengancam untuk menyemak semula hubungan gabungan apabila AP DAP meraikan kekalahan mahkamah Najib.

Masalah Struktur

Seperti yang dinyatakan Fair Observer, gabungan Anwar pada asasnya tidak stabil kerana ahli-ahlinya mempunyai kepentingan yang bertentangan:

  • Pengundi PH mahu reformasi, akauntabiliti, dan perubahan institusi.
  • UMNO mahu perlindungan untuk pemimpinnya, naungan untuk asasnya, dan dasar Melayu-dahulu.
  • Semakin kuat Anwar mendesak reformasi, semakin besar risikonya kehilangan UMNO. Semakin beliau memenuhi UMNO, semakin beliau kehilangan asas reformasi.

Hasilnya

Apa yang anda dapat bukan reformasi. Apa yang anda dapat ialah pengurusan. Penyelenggaraan gabungan yang berselindung di sebalik tadbir urus. Setiap keputusan besar — NFA Zahid, rombakan kabinet, undur AUKU, pusingan U garis panduan JAKIM — masuk akal hanya melalui lensa mengekalkan gabungan bersama, bukan menjadikan Malaysia lebih baik.

Sumber: Fair Observer

item.title: Anwar's Coalition Contradictions: Reformist PM, Corrupt DPM, and a Party That Enabled 1MDB
item.description:
Said by: Multiple analysts and commentators

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-09-01

The Impossible Coalition

Anwar Ibrahim governs Malaysia through a coalition that makes reform structurally impossible. The man who campaigned for decades against corruption now depends on the party that enabled the world’s largest kleptocracy.

The Cast of Characters

  • Anwar Ibrahim (PKR): Built his career on reformasi, anti-corruption, and clean governance.
  • Ahmad Zahid Hamidi (UMNO): Deputy PM. Faced 47 corruption charges. All dropped.
  • DAP: The coalition’s most consistent reform voice. Systematically sidelined in the December 2025 reshuffle.
  • UMNO: Najib’s party. Threatened to review coalition ties when a DAP MP celebrated Najib’s court loss.

The Structural Problem

As Fair Observer noted, Anwar’s coalition is fundamentally unstable because its members have opposing interests:

  • PH voters want reform, accountability, and institutional change.
  • UMNO wants protection for its leaders, patronage for its base, and Malay-first policies.
  • The harder Anwar pushes reform, the more he risks losing UMNO. The more he accommodates UMNO, the more he loses the reform base.

The Result

What you get is not reform. What you get is management. Coalition maintenance disguised as governance. Every major decision — the Zahid NFA, the cabinet reshuffle, the UUCA backtrack, the JAKIM guidelines U-turn — makes sense only through the lens of keeping the coalition together, not making Malaysia better.

*Source: *Fair Observer

item.title: [BM] 18,000 Berarak Tuntut Anwar Turun — Himpunan 'Turun Anwar' Penuhi Dataran Merdeka Atas Janji Mungkir
item.description:
Said by: Malaysian Public / Opposition Coalition

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-26

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU

Pada 26 Julai 2025, dianggarkan 18,000 orang memenuhi Dataran Merdeka di Kuala Lumpur, memakai baju-T hitam dan bandana berslogan “Turun Anwar”. Ia merupakan bantahan besar pertama menentang kerajaan sejak Anwar berkuasa pada 2022.

Reuters melaporkan: “Ribuan orang berhimpun di ibu negara Malaysia menuntut peletakan jawatan Perdana Menteri Anwar Ibrahim, ketika rasa tidak puas hati orang ramai meningkat terhadap kos sara hidup yang melonjak dan dakwaan gagal menunaikan janji reformasi.”

Bekas PM Mahathir Mohamad, berusia 100 tahun, menjadi penceramah utama. Beliau berkata kepada orang ramai: “Dia beri semua orang RM100 tetapi naikkan cukai pula. Dia tidak faham betapa teruknya golongan berpendapatan rendah menderita.”

Bekas PM Muhyiddin Yassin berkata rakyat telah mengadu tentang kenaikan harga daripada cukai jualan dan perkhidmatan yang diperluaskan.

🔥 MENGAPA IA PENTING

18,000 orang tidak hadir dalam kepanasan KL untuk membantah suka-suka. Himpunan ini adalah referendum terhadap janji yang dimungkiri. Tuntutan bantahan itu seperti kad markah kegagalan PH:

  • Kos sara hidup tidak dikurangkan
  • Janji manifesto PRU15 dimungkiri
  • Harga naik, gaji statik
  • Kronisme dan nepotisme semakin teruk
  • Dasar Madani “dimainkan di atas kertas” sahaja
  • Pendidikan dan kesihatan diabaikan
  • Semangat reformasi dikhianati
  • Anak muda hilang harapan soal perumahan dan pekerjaan Tajuk Bloomberg berkata segalanya: “Janji Mungkir Anwar Cetus Bantahan Menuntut Penyingkirannya.”

💩 MENGAPA IA MENGARUT

Semasa Anwar dalam pembangkang, beliau meraikan bantahan jalanan sebagai suara rakyat. Beliau berarak bersama Bersih. Beliau menyeru hak berhimpun secara aman. Kini apabila jalanan menentang beliau, respons kerajaan adalah membingkainya sebagai kacau-bilau anjuran pembangkang.

Penganjur bantahan menyenaraikan 16 rungutan khusus. Tiada satu pun tentang kaum atau agama. Semuanya tentang tadbir urus, ekonomi, dan akauntabiliti. Ini adalah orang ramai pelbagai kaum yang bersatu oleh kekecewaan terhadap kerajaan yang menjanjikan segalanya dan menyampaikan alasan.

Al Jazeera menyatakan ia adalah “bantahan besar pertama sejak Anwar diangkat berkuasa.” Kepentingannya jelas: bulan madu sudah tamat.

📜 KES-KES TERDAHULU

Malaysia mempunyai tradisi membanggakan bantahan jalanan memacu perubahan politik. Himpunan Bersih dari 2007-2016 memainkan peranan penting membina momentum yang akhirnya menjatuhkan BN. Anwar adalah penerima manfaat gerakan itu. Kini gerakan itu telah berpaling kepadanya. Ironinya begitu puitis.

🎯 SERUAN PH

18,000 rakyat Malaysia berdiri dalam panas untuk memberitahu anda mereka kecewa. Bukan marah kepada pembangkang. Bukan dimanipulasi ejen asing. Kecewa dengan anda. Mereka berarak kerana anda menjanjikan reformasi dan menyampaikan status quo. Anda janji kos lebih rendah dan sampaikan perluasan SST. Anda janji tadbir urus bersih dan sampaikan DNAA Zahid. Jalanan yang membawa anda berkuasa kini meminta anda pergi. Adakah anda mendengar?

Sumber: Reuters | Bloomberg | Al Jazeera | Straits Times

item.title: 18,000 March to Oust Anwar — 'Turun Anwar' Rally Fills Dataran Merdeka Over Broken Promises
item.description:
Said by: Malaysian Public / Opposition Coalition

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-26

📌 WHAT HAPPENED

On 26 July 2025, an estimated 18,000 people filled Dataran Merdeka (Independence Square) in Kuala Lumpur, wearing black t-shirts and bandannas with the slogan “Turun Anwar” (Step Down Anwar). It was the first major anti-government protest since Anwar came to power in 2022.

Reuters reported: “Thousands of people rallied in the Malaysian capital to demand the resignation of Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim, as public discontent grows over rising living costs and allegations of failing to deliver promised reforms.”

Former PM Mahathir Mohamad, aged 100, was the keynote speaker. He told the crowd: “He gave everyone RM100 but raised taxes instead. He doesn’t understand how badly the lower-income groups are suffering.”

Former PM Muhyiddin Yassin said people had been complaining about price hikes from the expanded sales and service tax.

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS

18,000 people don’t show up in the KL heat to protest for fun. This rally was a referendum on broken promises. The protest’s demands read like a scorecard of PH failures:

  • Cost of living not reduced
  • GE15 manifesto promises broken
  • Prices rising, salaries stagnant
  • Cronyism and nepotism worsening
  • Madani policy is “played on paper” only
  • Education and health neglected
  • The spirit of reformasi betrayed
  • Young people losing hope on housing and jobs Bloomberg’s headline said it all: “Anwar’s Broken Promises Spark Protests Demanding His Ouster.”

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT

When Anwar was in opposition, he celebrated street protests as the voice of the rakyat. He marched with Bersih. He called for the right to peaceful assembly. Now that the streets are against him, the government’s response was to frame it as opposition-organised troublemaking.

The protest organisers listed 16 specific grievances. Not one was about race or religion. They were all about governance, economics, and accountability. This was a multiracial crowd united by disappointment in a government that promised everything and delivered excuses.

Al Jazeera noted it was “the first major protest since Anwar was propelled to power.” The significance is clear: the honeymoon is over.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES

Malaysia has a proud tradition of street protest driving political change. Bersih rallies from 2007-2016 were instrumental in building the momentum that eventually toppled BN. Anwar was a beneficiary of that movement. Now the movement has turned on him. The irony is poetic.

🎯 PH CALLOUT

18,000 Malaysians stood in the sun to tell you they’re disappointed. Not angry at the opposition. Not manipulated by foreign agents. Disappointed in you. They marched because you promised reform and delivered status quo. You promised lower costs and delivered SST expansion. You promised clean governance and delivered Zahid’s DNAA. The streets that carried you to power are now asking you to leave. Are you listening?

Sources: Reuters | Bloomberg | Al Jazeera | Straits Times

item.title: [BM] SPRM Mahu Rampas RM3 Bilion Aset Keluarga Daim — Pengkritik Persoal Sama Ada Keadilan Atau Dendam
item.description:
Said by: MACC (Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission)

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-11

Merampas RM3 Bilion Daripada Keluarga Si Mati

Pada Julai 2025, SPRM mengumumkan ia sedang berusaha merampas dan melucuthakkan lebih daripada RM3 bilion aset merentasi 11 negara yang dikaitkan dengan mendiang Daim Zainuddin, keluarganya dan rakan-rakannya. Daim telah meninggal dunia lapan bulan sebelumnya, mengekalkan ketidasalahannya.

Fakta-Fakta

Fakta: Daim berkhidmat dua kali sebagai Menteri Kewangan dan dikreditkan membantu Malaysia pulih daripada Krisis Kewangan Asia 1997.

Fakta: Beliau didakwa pada Januari 2024 kerana gagal mengisytihar aset, berikutan pendedahan Pandora Papers. Pertuduhan digugurkan selepas kematiannya pada November 2024.

Fakta: Walaupun beliau meninggal dunia, SPRM meneruskan siasatan dan mengeluarkan notis pelucuthakan baharu pada Disember 2025.

Fakta: Daim menafikan semua kesalahan, berkata siasatan itu “bermotif politik.”

Fakta: Bloomberg bertanya terus: “Bolehkah Malaysia merampas $700 juta daripada tokoh perniagaan yang sudah meninggal?”

Mengapa Ia Penting

  • Jika kekayaan Daim diperolehi secara haram, pelucuthakan adalah wajar. Tetapi mengejar keluarga si mati sementara 47 pertuduhan Zahid digugurkan menimbulkan persoalan tidak selesa tentang keadilan terpilih.
  • Kredibiliti SPRM bergantung pada konsistensi. Mengejar berbilion Daim sambil mempertahankan skandal saham Azam Baki kelihatan seperti sasaran politik. *Sumber: Bloomberg · Bloomberg · *Malay Mail

item.title: MACC Seeks to Seize RM3 Billion in Daim Family Assets — Critics Ask If It's Justice or Vendetta
item.description:
Said by: MACC (Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission)

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-11

Seizing RM3 Billion From a Dead Man’s Family

In July 2025, MACC announced it was seeking to seize and forfeit more than RM3 billion in assets across 11 countries linked to the late Daim Zainuddin, his family, and associates. Daim had died eight months earlier, maintaining his innocence.

The Facts

Fact: Daim served twice as Finance Minister and was credited with helping Malaysia recover from the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis.

Fact: He was charged in January 2024 for failing to declare assets, following Pandora Papers revelations. The charge was dropped after his death in November 2024.

Fact: Despite his death, MACC continued investigations and issued fresh forfeiture notices in December 2025.

Fact: Daim had denied all wrongdoing, saying the investigations were “politically motivated.”

Fact: Bloomberg asked directly: “Could Malaysia seize $700 million from a dead tycoon?”

Why It Matters

  • If Daim’s wealth was illegally obtained, forfeiture is justified. But pursuing a dead man’s family while Zahid’s 47 charges were dropped raises uncomfortable questions about selective justice.
  • MACC’s credibility depends on consistency. Going after Daim’s billions while defending Azam Baki’s share scandal looks like political targeting. *Sources: Bloomberg · Bloomberg · *Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] Perbicaraan Rasuah Lim Guan Eng — Pegawai SPRM Beri Keterangan Mengenai Wang Diberi Kepada Bekas KM Pulau Pinang
item.description:
Said by: Lim Guan Eng, former Penang CM / MACC

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-10

📌 APA YANG BERLAKU: Pada 10 Julai 2025, seorang pegawai penyiasat SPRM memberitahu Mahkamah Sesyen bahawa semasa siasatan penipuan pada Disember 2019, Datuk Zarul Ahmad Mohd Zulkifli — ketika itu pengarah Consortium Zenith Construction (CZCSB) — mendedahkan beliau telah memberikan wang kepada kedua-dua G. Gnanaraja dan Lim Guan Eng berkaitan projek terowong dasar laut Pulau Pinang. Penguasa Kanan SPRM Ng Heng Jun mengesahkan beliau telah memaklumkan pegawai atasan mengenai kenyataan Zarul. Projek terowong itu, bernilai RM6.3 bilion, telah digambarkan oleh saksi SPRM sebagai ‘serupa penipuan tanah.’

🔥 MENGAPA IA PENTING: Lim Guan Eng adalah pemimpin paling terkenal DAP dan Ketua Menteri Pulau Pinang selama 10 tahun. Beliau adalah wajah model tadbir urus DAP. Jika dakwaan rasuah terowong dibuktikan, ia bukan sahaja membabitkan seorang ahli politik — ia membabitkan keseluruhan legasi DAP di Pulau Pinang. Projek RM6.3 bilion yang saksi SPRM gambarkan sebagai ‘penipuan tanah’ akan menjadi kes rasuah terbesar dikaitkan dengan pemimpin DAP dalam sejarah parti.

💩 MENGAPA IA MENGARUT: DAP telah memposisikan diri sebagai parti antirasuah selama berdekad. Keseluruhan jenamanya adalah tadbir urus bersih dan meritokrasi. Perbicaraan terowong Pulau Pinang mengancam meruntuhkan jenama itu. Dan respons DAP? Senyap daripada kepimpinan kebangsaan. Tiada tuntutan terbuka untuk akauntabiliti penuh. Tiada semakan bebas proses perolehan Pulau Pinang di bawah Guan Eng. Parti yang menuntut akauntabiliti daripada semua orang lain tidak mampu menuntutnya daripada diri sendiri.

📜 KES-KES TERDAHULU: Projek terowong diluluskan semasa pemerintahan Guan Eng, menggunakan mekanisme ‘permintaan cadangan’ dan bukannya tender terbuka — kaedah perolehan yang pengkritik kata memihak syarikat berkait. Kekaburan perolehan yang sama dikritik dalam Pelan Induk Pengangkutan Pulau Pinang (PTMP). Di bawah DAP, projek mega Pulau Pinang secara konsisten mengelak proses tender terbuka.

🎯 SERUAN PH: Bekas KM Pulau Pinang anda sedang dibicarakan atas rasuah berkaitan projek RM6.3 bilion yang SPRM panggil ‘penipuan tanah.’ KM Pulau Pinang semasa anda kata projek terowong itu ‘masih aktif.’ Parti anda tidak berkata apa-apa bermakna tentang akauntabiliti. Sama ada tuntut ketelusan penuh daripada pemimpin sendiri atau berhenti berpura-pura DAP adalah parti antirasuah. Anda tidak boleh dua-dua.

Sumber: Malay Mail

item.title: Lim Guan Eng Corruption Trial — MACC Officer Testifies About Money Given to Former Penang CM
item.description:
Said by: Lim Guan Eng, former Penang CM / MACC

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-10

📌 WHAT HAPPENED: On 10 July 2025, a MACC investigating officer told the Sessions Court that during a fraud investigation in December 2019, Datuk Zarul Ahmad Mohd Zulkifli — then director of Consortium Zenith Construction (CZCSB) — revealed he had given money to both G. Gnanaraja and Lim Guan Eng in connection with the Penang undersea tunnel project. MACC Senior Superintendent Ng Heng Jun confirmed he had informed his superiors about Zarul’s statement. The tunnel project, worth RM6.3 billion, has been described by MACC witnesses as ‘akin to a land scam.’

🔥 WHY IT MATTERS: Lim Guan Eng was DAP’s most prominent leader and Penang’s Chief Minister for 10 years. He’s the face of DAP’s governance model. If the tunnel corruption allegations are proven, it doesn’t just implicate one politician — it implicates DAP’s entire Penang legacy. A RM6.3 billion project that MACC witnesses describe as a ’land scam’ would be the biggest corruption case linked to a DAP leader in the party’s history.

💩 WHY IT’S BULLSHIT: DAP has positioned itself as the anti-corruption party for decades. Its entire brand is clean governance and meritocracy. The Penang tunnel trial threatens to demolish that brand. And DAP’s response? Silence from the national leadership. No public demand for full accountability. No independent review of Penang’s procurement processes under Guan Eng. The party that demands accountability from everyone else cannot bring itself to demand it from its own.

📜 PREVIOUS CASES: The tunnel project was approved during Guan Eng’s tenure, using a ‘request for proposal’ mechanism rather than open tender — a procurement method that critics say favours connected companies. The same procurement opacity was criticised in the Penang Transport Master Plan (PTMP). Under DAP, Penang’s mega-projects consistently avoided open tender processes.

🎯 PH CALLOUT: Your former Penang CM is on trial for corruption related to a RM6.3 billion project that MACC calls a ’land scam.’ Your current Penang CM says the tunnel project is ‘still active.’ Your party has said nothing meaningful about accountability. Either demand full transparency from your own leaders or stop pretending DAP is the anti-corruption party. You can’t have it both ways.

Sources: Malay Mail

item.title: [BM] GLC Sebagai Tempat Buang Politik — 47.5 Lantikan Setahun, Lebih Banyak Daripada Mahathir 2.0
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS Think Tank Research

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-04

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Penyelidikan badan pemikir IDEAS mendapati kerajaan Anwar melantik purata 47.5 lantikan politik setahun ke Syarikat Berkaitan Kerajaan (GLC) dan badan berkanun — melebihi kadar Mahathir 2.0 sebanyak 43 setahun dan jauh melebihi matlamat lantikan berasaskan merit. Sebanyak 238 lantikan politik didokumenkan sepanjang tahun-tahun pertama Anwar.

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

GLC mengawal bahagian besar ekonomi Malaysia — Petronas, Khazanah, TNB, Telekom, MAHB, dan berpuluh-puluh lagi. Apabila jawatan lembaga pengarah diisi berdasarkan kesetiaan politik dan bukannya kecekapan, akibatnya besar: keputusan strategik yang lemah, rasuah, dan salah urus. Setiap lantikan politik yang kurang kemahiran untuk peranan mereka merugikan ekonomi dari segi kecekapan, inovasi, dan nilai pemegang saham.

💩 Mengapa Ia Mengarut

PH bertanding atas platform JELAS menamatkan naungan politik dalam GLC. Anwar sendiri mengkritik amalan BN. Beliau menjanjikan lantikan berasaskan merit dan akauntabiliti prestasi. Sebaliknya, beliau melantik sekutu politik pada kadar LEBIH PANTAS daripada pendahulunya. Reformis yang berjanji menamatkan naungan telah mengindustrikannya.

📜 Kes-Kes Terdahulu

Di bawah Najib, lantikan GLC adalah tunjang naungan UMNO. Skandal 1MDB sendiri sebahagiannya dimungkinkan oleh lembaga yang dilantik secara politik yang gagal dalam pengawasan. Di bawah Mahathir 2.0, 43/tahun. Di bawah Anwar, 47.5/tahun. Setiap kerajaan menjanjikan reformasi; setiap kerajaan mengukuhkan naungan lebih dalam.

🎯 Seruan PH

47.5 lantikan politik setahun. LEBIH daripada kerajaan Mahathir. Anda tidak mereformasi tadbir urus GLC — anda mempercepatkan mesin naungan. Setiap lantikan politik tidak layak di lembaga GLC mewakili seorang profesional berkelayakan yang dilepaskan. Ini adalah rasuah dengan langkah tambahan.

Sumber

  • Eurasia Review — Dasar Ekonomi Berasaskan Kaum
  • Rosa Luxemburg — Malaysia 2024

item.title: [BM] Reformasi Perkhidmatan Awam: Tiga Tahun Bercakap, Sifar Perubahan Struktur — 1.6 Juta Birokrat Tidak Disentuh
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS / Public Policy Analysts

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-04

📌 Apa Yang Berlaku

Anwar Ibrahim memasuki pejabat menjanjikan reformasi perkhidmatan awam menyeluruh — pemodenan, meritokrasi, mengecilkan birokrasi yang gemuk yang memakan bahagian besar belanjawan negara. Tiga tahun kemudian, perkhidmatan awam kekal pada dasarnya tidak berubah: 1.3-1.6 juta pekerja (tidak termasuk polis dan tentera), 90% Bumiputera, memakan kira-kira 40% daripada jumlah perbelanjaan mengurus kerajaan dalam gaji dan pencen.

🔥 Mengapa Ia Penting

Badan pemikir IDEAS mendapati kerajaan Anwar sebenarnya meningkatkan lantikan politik ke GLC dan badan berkanun, purata 47.5 setahun — melebihi kadar Mahathir 2.0 sebanyak 43 setahun. Birokrasi yang gemuk bermakna Malaysia membelanjakan lebih banyak untuk gaji penjawat awam berbanding perbelanjaan pembangunan. Kewajipan pencen terus membengkak tanpa reformasi struktur.

💩 Mengapa Ia Mengarut

Cadangan untuk penilaian berasaskan prestasi, pengecilan saiz, dan kenaikan pangkat berasaskan merit tidak ke mana kerana undi perkhidmatan awam adalah penting secara politik — tiada kerajaan mahu menggusarkan 1.6 juta pengundi dan keluarga mereka. Reformasi sentiasa pembohongan; perkhidmatan awam adalah tabung undi PH sama seperti BN dahulu.

🎯 Seruan PH

Anda janji meritokrasi. Anda sampaikan lebih banyak lantikan politik daripada Mahathir. Anda janji pengecilan saiz. Birokrasi membesar. Anda janji pemodenan. Ketidakcekapan yang sama berterusan. Pada satu ketika, ‘reformasi’ berhenti menjadi janji dan menjadi bahan jenaka. Anda sudah melepasi titik itu dua tahun lalu.

Sumber

  • Eurasia Review — Dasar Ekonomi Berasaskan Kaum

item.title: Civil Service Reform: Three Years of Talk, Zero Structural Change — 1.6 Million Bureaucrats Untouched
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS / Public Policy Analysts

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-04

📌 What Happened

Anwar Ibrahim entered office promising sweeping civil service reform — modernisation, meritocracy, right-sizing a bloated bureaucracy that consumes a massive share of the national budget. Three years later, the civil service remains essentially unchanged: 1.3-1.6 million employees (excluding police and military), 90% Bumiputera, consuming approximately 40% of total government operating expenditure in salaries and pensions.

🔥 Why It Matters

IDEAS think tank found that the Anwar government actually increased political appointments to GLCs and statutory bodies, averaging 47.5 per year — exceeding even Mahathir 2.0’s rate of 43 per year. The bloated bureaucracy means Malaysia spends more on civil servant wages than on development spending. Pension obligations continue to balloon with no structural reform.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

Proposals for performance-based assessments, right-sizing, and merit-based promotions have gone nowhere because the civil service vote is politically crucial — no government wants to antagonise 1.6 million voters and their families. Reform was always a lie; the civil service is PH’s vote bank just as it was BN’s.

🎯 PH Callout

You promised meritocracy. You delivered more political appointments than Mahathir. You promised right-sizing. The bureaucracy grew. You promised modernisation. The same inefficiencies persist. At some point, ‘reform’ stops being a promise and becomes a punchline. You passed that point two years ago.

Sources

  • Eurasia Review — Race-Based Economic Policies

item.title: GLCs as Political Dumping Ground — 47.5 Appointees Per Year, Even MORE Than Mahathir 2.0
item.description:
Said by: IDEAS Think Tank Research

Category: Politics

Date: 2025-07-04

📌 What Happened

Research by IDEAS think tank found that the Anwar government appointed an average of 47.5 political appointees per year to Government-Linked Companies (GLCs) and statutory bodies — exceeding even Mahathir 2.0’s rate of 43 per year and far surpassing the stated goal of merit-based appointments. A total of 238 political appointments were documented across Anwar’s first years.

🔥 Why It Matters

GLCs control a massive share of the Malaysian economy — Petronas, Khazanah, TNB, Telekom, MAHB, and dozens more. When board positions are filled based on political loyalty rather than competence, the consequences are enormous: poor strategic decisions, corruption, and mismanagement. Every political appointee who lacks the skills for their role costs the economy in efficiency, innovation, and shareholder value.

💩 Why It’s Bullshit

PH ran on an EXPLICIT platform of ending political patronage in GLCs. Anwar himself criticised BN’s practice. He promised merit-based appointments and performance accountability. Instead, he’s appointing political allies at a FASTER rate than his predecessors. The reformist who promised to end patronage has industrialised it.

📜 Previous Cases

Under Najib, GLC appointments were a cornerstone of UMNO patronage. The 1MDB scandal itself was partly enabled by politically-appointed boards that failed in oversight. Under Mahathir 2.0, 43/year. Under Anwar, 47.5/year. Each government promises reform; each government entrenches patronage deeper.

🎯 PH Callout

47.5 political appointees per year. MORE than Mahathir’s government. You didn’t reform GLC governance — you accelerated the patronage machine. Every unqualified political appointee on a GLC board represents a qualified professional passed over. This is corruption with extra steps.

Sources

  • Eurasia Review — Race-Based Economic Policies
  • Rosa Luxemburg — Malaysia 2024

item.title: [BM] Kontroversi Pelantikan Kehakiman 2025 — Pilihan Anwar Untuk Ketua Hakim Negara Cetus Kemarahan
item.description:

Date: 2025-07-01

Judicial appointment controversy erupted after Chief Justice Tengku Maimun retired. Anwar’s replacement picks raised concerns about judicial independence and executive overreach. The man who was once the judiciary’s most famous victim now undermines its independence.
